name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Federal Prison Staff Evade Security Searches, Slip Contraband into Facilities
body:
In the latest of several troubling security lapses to rock the nation’s federal prison system, jail staff often enter facilities without being searched, contributing to a pandemic of contraband smuggled to inmates.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | August 18, 2021
---|---|---

# [Federal Prison Staff Evade Security Searches, Slip Contraband into Facilities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56440&L=25634&F=H&)
In the latest of several troubling security lapses to rock the nation’s federal prison system, jail staff often enter facilities without being searched, contributing to a pandemic of contraband smuggled to inmates. Security video examined by investigators from the Department of Justice Office of Inspector General (DOJ OIG) shows staff at a high-security facility entering during the night and walking around metal detectors without being screened. The breach is one of a multitude identified recently by the watchdog, which warns the DOJ of “urgent security concerns” in its famously inefficient security system at Bureau of Prisons (BOP) locations nationwide.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56440&L=25634&F=H&)

Zachor made two requests under the Texas Public Information Act for information about the funding or donations made to Texas A&M; by the government of Qatar and agencies and subdivisions of the government of Qatar. Qatar controversially has aligned itself with Islamic terrorists and extremists, which has placed it at odds with the United States, Israel and other U.S. allies in the Middle East. ### [The Fetal Organ “Chop Shop” Exposed ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56440&L=25636&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2Nob3Atc2hvcC1leHBvc2VkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODE5MDAxMTUw) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch is representing the Center for Medical Progress in a FOIA request battle for information on a federally-funded human organ harvesting project at the University of Pittsburgh. The 252 pages of documents received thus far reveal shocking details of the university’s quest to become a “tissue hub” for human organ harvesting. As Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton noted in the Weekly Update, the documents show that “the NIH ... gave nearly three million dollars to the University of Pittsburgh’s quest to be a tissue hub for human fetal tissue ranging from 6 to 42 weeks gestation.” “By the way,” Fitton added, “42 weeks is typically two weeks past a normal pregnancy.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56440&L=25636&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2Nob3Atc2hvcC1leHBvc2VkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODE5MDAxMTUw)

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Answer the call of duty

body:
Courageous and faithful, that’s the kind of people we need right now, and I hope that you’re one of them. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca8b161f2ad74e3db6706f99a1242600&_e=2w9cMS78vYRbywywL5VowvHYP39KrJWwXk0jSD4lYbyBWB0U4GDrT1wi9JVcJhHFEyDOHf9Vez_4na3VUc3rndt4waB6OnWMA9QbvJ4uaBhapAKdmIOymZqb6K4mPj2xKt8YAT8qFBS9dYA_9ZTOq-Lr0udWIuwsa5BXWvs1g29hb66MIT1NxQ_GYLiHwVr7ex1x0oXh75pmqGSbYvgMyp61x_-yBKE38FlXe99oeDXMNUFtS1JrXCQaBkQHU8kfOU6Vemsm2NpaO67SufISWzJ2ve0XQNoXLHlQGOyLPYSHCfxybZLRZov_xyhyfBvy8qnVL3AoGmGiGR6LYajXMFpvnMp0lWmNvJXEPoazeo-UBtgPObi-nD12bk9ZLjMSPTYJZSVhIuv0MF3QZJk4E7xNzAmmR0nMl1hTf1SXa7M%3D)

---
**Courageous and faithful** , that’s the kind of people this nation needs right now, and I hope that you, Peter, are one of those people.

**My name is Erik Aadland. I’m a father, a former Army officer, a veteran of Iraq and Afghanistan, and I’m running to be the next United States Senator from Colorado.**

If you’re a conservative like me, I know you’re fed up with the liberals taking over our country, burning our flag, and screaming about how they think this nation oppresses them, when you and I both know that’s a lie.

_**Every day that we stand by and do nothing, is another day that these radicals try to push our country towards failure until our country looks like a shadow of what it used to be.**_

**But I’m telling you right now, I didn’t get shot at by terrorists halfway around the world just to come home to an America that I don’t even recognize.** I’ve seen real suffering, real oppression, and cruelty that these privileged liberals could never imagine, and [**I need your help to make sure their version of America never sees the light of day.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca8b161f2ad74e3db6706f99a1242600&_e=2w9cMS78vYRbywywL5VowvHYP39KrJWwXk0jSD4lYbyBWB0U4GDrT1wi9JVcJhHFEyDOHf9Vez_4na3VUc3rndt4waB6OnWMA9QbvJ4uaBhapAKdmIOymZqb6K4mPj2xKt8YAT8qFBS9dYA_9ZTOq-Lr0udWIuwsa5BXWvs1g29hb66MIT1NxQ_GYLiHwVr7ex1x0oXh75pmqGSbYvgMynLRQSvX7KbCD-CDABVzPSHs3YzcCM56z5D0h5IzMyn-r36d-hAdHvBAknF8nqHykKQnzR3N8ejKZJKUHV4AQzEy6kGoZOq8gyQ0eM1UrLHmbNB5GPw-DiF_pn-AANll8jzpvkmhTSoNXXS1XoYhxmwRDzdppdBWiq2oi7pUiS82dzklzir79ZRZxAiYryRYhXMRHl6TpmdBzvrap9UFTr0%3D)

Right now, our country’s future is imperiled by a corrupt establishment, and _**people like you and I must act.**_ **We need to be courageous and faithful in the face of liberal radicalism.** We must stand united saying with one voice that we won’t be pushed around, we won’t bend a knee, and we won’t sit quietly while our rights are trampled.

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca8b161f2ad74e3db6706f99a1242600&_e=2w9cMS78vYRbywywL5VowvHYP39KrJWwXk0jSD4lYbyBWB0U4GDrT1wi9JVcJhHFEyDOHf9Vez_4na3VUc3rndt4waB6OnWMA9QbvJ4uaBhapAKdmIOymZqb6K4mPj2xKt8YAT8qFBS9dYA_9ZTOq-Lr0udWIuwsa5BXWvs1g29hb66MIT1NxQ_GYLiHwVr7ex1x0oXh75pmqGSbYvgMypU5s2tQInskVudKOsE4pYeLOACnvq4l_01PKnZL-CoXFp7gwDbMrOZZ_hvq69d-StHKir87Cy-tCk25Ja5cYQnzObDIXOMPJSwUPBVqv2198bnpyEcxKH-sXSdPdKW7wb_a3nTCnf73k9Uh7vb2tfVSw3e9QaRNZkgTKF9uO9-EhzcTahCSxZBHuSUprQ3ue5Yq5aN89dMvTpHjYwSq8nQ%3D)
People used to elect wise individuals who they knew would strive to do the right thing, yet here we are with Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi corrupting everything they touch. We cannot balk in the face of extraordinary opposition, nor can we sit by and hope someone else will do the hard work for us.

I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States, and right now I’m answering that call of duty, and [**I’m asking you to do the same.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca8b161f2ad74e3db6706f99a1242600&_e=2w9cMS78vYRbywywL5VowvHYP39KrJWwXk0jSD4lYbyBWB0U4GDrT1wi9JVcJhHFEyDOHf9Vez_4na3VUc3rndt4waB6OnWMA9QbvJ4uaBhapAKdmIOymZqb6K4mPj2xKt8YAT8qFBS9dYA_9ZTOq-Lr0udWIuwsa5BXWvs1g29hb66MIT1NxQ_GYLiHwVr7ex1x0oXh75pmqGSbYvgMytImvzKectGBwYZIHqzzBee8qrizfzrXCANLlHbdDxA3ti80TrLmxFdKVgEe2QaMo7vGbTsNzVuGFU5T6gLUug2YPiv0JTtR7EB7RoFI8Xi_dz3evT48ZlpwKBg-KSShKRgrbrsJG-wzBGvFDu-be_nx2x22_6tgHBmemcGriSkE7-XSHJeTP8o1YVSrpIP1KrexHmPH0URkKx2O0B-y0U0%3D) We’re dealing with liberal Senators who care more about promoting riots and lining their own pockets, instead of bettering this nation.

We need to put America first, and I need your help to do that. clean_body: Courageous and faithful, that’s the kind of people we need right now, and I hope that you’re one of them. | Courageous and faithful , that’s the kind of people this nation needs right now, and I hope that you, Peter, are one of those people. My name is Erik Aadland. I’m a father, a former Army officer, a veteran of Iraq and Afghanistan, and I’m running to be the next United States Senator from Colorado. If you’re a conservative like me, I know you’re fed up with the liberals taking over our country, burning our flag, and screaming about how they think this nation oppresses them, when you and I both know that’s a lie. Every day that we stand by and do nothing, is another day that these radicals try to push our country towards failure until our country looks like a shadow of what it used to be. But I’m telling you right now, I didn’t get shot at by terrorists halfway around the world just to come home to an America that I don’t even recognize. I’ve seen real suffering, real oppression, and cruelty that these privileged liberals could never imagine, and Right now, our country’s future is imperiled by a corrupt establishment, and people like you and I must act. We need to be courageous and faithful in the face of liberal radicalism. We must stand united saying with one voice that we won’t be pushed around, we won’t bend a knee, and we won’t sit quietly while our rights are trampled. People used to elect wise individuals who they knew would strive to do the right thing, yet here we are with Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi corrupting everything they touch. We cannot balk in the face of extraordinary opposition, nor can we sit by and hope someone else will do the hard work for us. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: [BREAKING] Twitter Suspends Your Account
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Let's face it: I am not afraid of the
liberals in DC, and they WANT ME GONE. In fact, they're throwing
everything at me, including the kitchen sink, to get me out of
their way.
The latest: Big Tech has suspended my Twitter
account AGAIN - all because I refuse to allow Biden and Pelosi to
force vaccines on American citizens.
The entire liberal establishment, from the
Silicon Valley Cartel to Sleepy Joe to the Mainstream Media, is
coming down on any American Patriot who dares to question the
liberal vaccine plan.
If we are going to reclaim our nation, we
need to start fighting, RIGHT NOW. Will you help me fight back?
Dare to ask any questions - your voice will
be silenced.
Refuse to wear a mask - you will be forced
into lockdown.
Avoid the jab-you will be discriminated
against.
Sadly, for the liberal establishment, I was
duly elected to Congress as a strong Republican woman who is
determined to impeach Joe Biden and put an end to his plan to
force vaccines on Americans, and that's what I intend to do.

STAND WITH MTG -
DONATE TODAY

If you support my efforts to stop the radical
socialist agenda in Washington, then please donate $45 TODAY, so
I can continue working for the American people here in Congress.
Twitter suspends me because I question the
efficacy of a vaccine that was supposed to save us all but is
only forcing us back into lockdown.
When Kamala Harris said she would never take
the "Trump Vaccine," the press applauded her.
When Gavin Newsome violated his lockdown
orders, the media and Big Tech failed to censor him.
Andrew Cuomo still has a Twitter account
after accusations by 11 women of his serial sexual abuse.
And Twitter didn't even shut down the account
of John Weaver - the co-founder of the Lincoln Project - when he
was accused of using THAT VERY SERVICE to lure young boys for
sex.
His account should have been the first one
they deleted, but it wasn't-they came after me instead for
expressing my thoughts-the same ones that are supposed to be
protected by the First Amendment.
WHY ARE THEY SO WORRIED ABOUT ME?
They hate me because they can't stop me,
especially when I have America-loving Patriots like you in my
corner and they know that I'm telling you the truth about
Washington they don't want you to hear.
Will you join me and donate $50, $100, $250
or even $1,000 TODAY? We can't waste a single moment in taking
our nation back and stopping Pelosi's radical, socialist agenda.
They can change all the rules they want in
their efforts to silence me; IT WON'T WORK.
God Bless America,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

STAND WITH MTG -
DONATE TODAY

PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS
INC.

++

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

© 2021 USA Freedom Fighters

subject: We need real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
I am outraged, and you should be too.
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter,

**I am outraged, and you should be too.** Not only does the Biden administration not know how many American citizens are in Afghanistan, but they have NO plan to get them out. **The lack of leadership in The White House is astounding!** What is unfolding in front of our eyes is a national embarrassment.
President Biden's weakness and incompetence allowed this situation to evolve into a disaster. **Let me say this right now: leaving behind American citizens in a country that is run by the Taliban is NOT an option.** I will always stand up for our country and the brave men and women that have fought courageously for freedom. We need strong leadership, and we need it now. Thank you and God Bless, Ted Budd |

body:
Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156533:6JT6lOlXN:m:1:3253819041:259E4BFDA1A2940F972947ED60D05C17:r)

---

[**Peter, we need your help reaching as many voters as possible before they mail in their ballot, so we can be sure they vote YES on the recall question. Can we count on you to send in $10, $20, $30 so we can fund our get-out-the-vote efforts in this final stretch?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156533:6JT6lOlXN:m:1:3253819041:259E4BFDA1A2940F972947ED60D05C17:r)

The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It's imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can't do it without you.

Simply put, this is crunch time and everybody in the state should have received their ballots in the mail. Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled.

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Biden's Failure in Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGpkso&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQfaC9I&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/644e0160-b539-4903-8548-04b202292f4d.png]

The fall of Afghanistan and the rise of the Taliban. Biden's failure due to his weak incompetence.

Fellow citizens, I write this message with a heavy heart.

I'm sure you've already heard, Biden and his administration have allowed Afghanistan to fall into the hands of the Taliban. I'm all for ending wars and bringing our men and women who have faithfully served in our military home but there needed to be a clear, concise plan that wouldn't allow our military members' sacrifices to mean nothing. Biden did not have a plan to orderly withdraw in a way that didn't cause this exact scenario to take place. Unlike President Trump, Biden is a weak incompetent leader.

Watch my response below (it has been viewed over 10,000 times on social media):

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/27621578-edea-4670-9f6c-3ad7135f2cdb.jpg] [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SvI93T&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EtFAMmk&]
Back in July Biden had assured us that under his leadership the Taliban would not take Afghanistan back over but they have. The Biden administration has also stated it is [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SvI970&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIQ0Q4H&]not planning on prioritizing thousands of American citizens who are stranded in Afghanistan as the country falls. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SvI970&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIcCzwV&]

And where was the "Commander in Chief?"

Joe Biden was at Camp David on vacation. Even when the news broke that the Taliban toppled the U.S.-backed Afghan government Biden didn't rush back to the Whitehouse but waited until today to address the nation.

Biden's lack of leadership has cost countless lives that didn't need to be lost.

All we have seen from this administration has been abysmal failures. Under President Trump our borders were secure, Americans felt safe, and our men and women in our military were coming home with a strategic plan of exit to keep Afghanistan secure. Now we have open borders, the Taliban back in power, and our military once again bearing the brunt of those decisions.

Biden's administration has solely focused on pandering to the radical left with their "wokeism" by flying pride flags at the U.S. Embassy in Kabul in June and playing games rather than winning wars and protecting America.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/efbe4219-151e-48b7-b021-5bce6de6fce4.jpg]
We must hold our leaders accountable.

Biden / Harris and the current administration have failed America. We must demand help for the American citizens who are stranded in Afghanistan, and citizens who have been allies to America. Then we must demand that Biden and his administration answer for their failure.

Call and write your elected officials, let them hear your voice. Consider contributing to our campaign to fight back against the radical coup of the left.

We cannot forget what Biden has done to our great nation, and we must stand up and defend America. Now is our time in history to dare to be great.

God bless America.

Loren

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SvI9da&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIWDtTn&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SvI9gP&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESwJF3f&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SvI9Dt&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMHDSqU&]

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=BGpkso&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVK6wXF&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=BGpkso&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EE3Qiy&pt=change_details] at any time.

name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: Tyler Harper Announces Key Endorsements and Experienced Campaign Team
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, AUGUST 19, 2021
---
| TYLER HARPER ANNOUNCES KEY ENDORSEMENTS, EXPERIENCED CAMPAIGN TEAM
---
| OCILLA - Today, conservative candidate for Agriculture Commissioner Tyler Harper announced a major round of endorsements from nearly every Republican member of the Georgia State Senate. This group features a cohort of strong, conservative legislators and leaders in their communities who have served alongside Tyler and understand that he is the best person to keep Georgia growing strong as our state's next Agriculture Commissioner.
"I am humbled and grateful to have the support of so many solid leaders from the Georgia Legislature, as well as the expertise of such a seasoned and hardworking campaign team," said Tyler Harper. "These endorsements show that our campaign has the momentum to go the distance for local and family farmers, consumers, and hardworking Georgia families. I look forward to continuing to travel the state and share our message as we fight for Georgia's number one industry and secure a strong win for all Georgians as their next Agriculture Commissioner."

Endorsing state senators include:
• John Albers • Jason Anavitarte • Brandon Beach • Matt Brass • Dean Burke • Max Burns • Bill Cowsert • Clint Dixon • Greg Dolezal • Mike Dugan • Frank Ginn • Steve Gooch • Russ Goodman • Marty Harbin • Bo Hatchett • Billy Hickman • Chuck Hufstetler • Burt Jones • John F. Kennedy • Kay Kirkpatrick • Sheila McNeill • Jeff Mullis • Chuck Payne • Randy Robertson • Brian Strickland • Carden Summers • Lindsey Tippins • Ben Watson

The Harper Campaign also announced the hiring of key team members, who together bring a wealth of expertise and experience to his campaign.
Billy Kirkland - Senior Advisor
Billy Kirkland brings over 15 years of political, issue and coalition management, and campaign experience to the table. During the 2020 cycle, he served as State Director for President Donald Trump's campaign. Prior to that, Billy served in the White House as a special assistant to Vice President Mike Pence. During the 2016 presidential election cycle, Kirkland served as the Trump Campaign's senior advisor for Georgia. In 2014, he served as U.S. Senator David Perdue's campaign manager, prior to which Kirkland served as the National Field Director of the Faith & Freedom Coalition (FFC). Kirkland is the founder and managing partner at PWK Group, LLC, a firm he launched in 2015.
Stephen Lawson - Senior Advisor for Communications
Stephen Lawson is a veteran political strategist with over a decade of experience advising successful campaigns and organizations. He has served in various communications roles, including Rapid Response director for Florida Governor Rick Scott's 2014 successful re-election and Communications Director for Ron DeSantis' successful 2018 gubernatorial campaign. Most recently, Lawson served as the Deputy Campaign Manager and Communications Director for the campaign of U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler, directing the entire communications strategy for one of the most expensive political races in United States history. In 2021, Lawson launched his own communications consulting firm, Battleground Strategies.
Matt Littlefield - Campaign Manager
Matt Littlefield is the founder of MCL Government Affairs Group, which specializes in lobbying, procurement, appropriations, and business consulting. As a lobbyist, Littlefield has fought for law enforcement officers, lower taxes, and more patient choice in healthcare, and in 2019 earned the "Top Lobbyist Rising Star Award" from James Magazine. He has accumulated years' worth of valuable experience, gaining extensive knowledge of the legislative process and playmakers. In 2020, Littlefield served as the statewide field director for Doug Collins' U.S. Senate campaign. He is a lifelong Georgian and graduate of the University of Georgia.
Denise Deal - Fundraising Director
Denise Deal is the president of The Sassafras Group and Southern Magnolia Capital, firms specializing in political and non-profit fundraising, respectively. She served as the finance director for the successful election of Governor Nathan Deal and raised over $16 million for his re-election. She also served as the executive director of Vision 2030, working with Hall County leaders to implement the goals and objectives defined by the community. Deal worked as a government affairs representative for the Georgia Farm Bureau, and she serves as a board member of the Georgia Chamber of Commerce. In 2006, she was named to Georgia Trend Magazine's "40 under 40" list.

---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, AUGUST 19, 2021 | TYLER HARPER ANNOUNCES KEY ENDORSEMENTS, EXPERIENCED CAMPAIGN TEAM | OCILLA - Today, conservative candidate for Agriculture Commissioner Tyler Harper announced a major round of endorsements from nearly every Republican member of the Georgia State Senate. This group features a cohort of strong, conservative legislators and leaders in their communities who have served alongside Tyler and understand that he is the best person to keep Georgia growing strong as our state's next Agriculture Commissioner. "I am humbled and grateful to have the support of so many solid leaders from the Georgia Legislature, as well as the expertise of such a seasoned and hardworking campaign team," said Tyler Harper. "These endorsements show that our campaign has the momentum to go the distance for local and family farmers, consumers, and hardworking Georgia families. I look forward to continuing to travel the state and share our message as we fight for Georgia's number one industry and secure a strong win for all Georgians as their next Agriculture Commissioner." Endorsing state senators include: • John Albers • Jason Anavitarte • Brandon Beach • Matt Brass • Dean Burke • Max Burns • Bill Cowsert • Clint Dixon • Greg Dolezal • Mike Dugan • Frank Ginn • Steve Gooch • Russ Goodman • Marty Harbin • Bo Hatchett • Billy Hickman • Chuck Hufstetler • Burt Jones • John F. Kennedy • Kay Kirkpatrick • Sheila McNeill • Jeff Mullis • Chuck Payne • Randy Robertson • Brian Strickland • Carden Summers • Lindsey Tippins • Ben Watson The Harper Campaign also announced the hiring of key team members, who together bring a wealth of expertise and experience to his campaign. Billy Kirkland - Senior Advisor Billy Kirkland brings over 15 years of political, issue and coalition management, and campaign experience to the table. During the 2020 cycle, he served as State Director for President Donald Trump's campaign. Prior to that, Billy served in the White House as a special assistant to Vice President Mike Pence. During the 2016 presidential election cycle, Kirkland served as the Trump Campaign's senior advisor for Georgia. In 2014, he served as U.S. Senator David Perdue's campaign manager, prior to which Kirkland served as the National Field Director of the Faith & Freedom Coalition (FFC). Kirkland is the founder and managing partner at PWK Group, LLC, a firm he launched in 2015. Stephen Lawson - Senior Advisor for Communications Stephen Lawson is a veteran political strategist with over a decade of experience advising successful campaigns and organizations. He has served in various communications roles, including Rapid Response director for Florida Governor Rick Scott's 2014 successful re-election and Communications Director for Ron DeSantis' successful 2018 gubernatorial campaign. Most recently, Lawson served as the Deputy Campaign Manager and Communications Director for the campaign of U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler, directing the entire communications strategy for one of the most expensive political races in United States history. In 2021, Lawson launched his own communications consulting firm, Battleground Strategies. Matt Littlefield - Campaign Manager Matt Littlefield is the founder of MCL Government Affairs Group, which specializes in lobbying, procurement, appropriations, and business consulting. As a lobbyist, Littlefield has fought for law enforcement officers, lower taxes, and more patient choice in healthcare, and in 2019 earned the "Top Lobbyist Rising Star Award" from James Magazine. He has accumulated years' worth of valuable experience, gaining extensive knowledge of the legislative process and playmakers. In 2020, Littlefield served as the statewide field director for Doug Collins' U.S. Senate campaign. He is a lifelong Georgian and graduate of the University of Georgia. Denise Deal - Fundraising Director Denise Deal is the president of The Sassafras Group and Southern Magnolia Capital, firms specializing in political and non-profit fundraising, respectively. She served as the finance director for the successful election of Governor Nathan Deal and raised over $16 million for his re-election. She also served as the executive director of Vision 2030, working with Hall County leaders to implement the goals and objectives defined by the community. Deal worked as a government affairs representative for the Georgia Farm Bureau, and she serves as a board member of the Georgia Chamber of Commerce. In 2006, she was named to Georgia Trend Magazine's "40 under 40" list. | | | | Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. Follow along on Tyler's campaign for Agriculture Commissioner on ==, ==, and ==. | | | | | | == | == == == | | Tyler Harper for Georgia | PO Box 798, Ocilla, GA 31774 | | Sent by mailto:press@tylerharperga.com powered by

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: Why I'm running for U.S. Senate, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
I've officially announced my campaign

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156199:6SdZIOl1N:m:1:3253819041:7D35F3E0119D49FFD0D349EC44CF4F8E:r)
Peter,

I've officially announced my campaign for U.S. Senate in Nevada and I wanted to tell you first. This race will determine who controls the Senate, so [**if you can chip-in I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156199:6SdZIOl1N:m:1:3253819041:7D35F3E0119D49FFD0D349EC44CF4F8E:r)

****
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156199:6SdZIOl1N:m:1:3253819041:7D35F3E0119D49FFD0D349EC44CF4F8E:r)
[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156199:6SdZIOl1N:m:1:3253819041:7D35F3E0119D49FFD0D349EC44CF4F8E:r)
---

Why am I running for U.S. Senate? The radical left, rich elites, woke corporations, academia, Hollywood, and the media - they're all taking over America. They tell lie after lie, making excuses for chaos and violence, ruthlessly enforcing conformity, canceling any who stand in their way. We need to fight for what's right. That's what Americans do. That's a legacy we have a duty to protect.

After 9/11, I volunteered to serve in the Navy, and I served in Iraq during the surge, together with other men and women of all races and backgrounds. We were all Americans, doing our part. Defending this great nation from those determined to destroy it.

As Attorney General of Nevada, I fought for our Constitution and the American way of life, stood up for rape and human trafficking victims who couldn't stand for themselves, and went after guardianship abuse and the opioid crisis.

But the battle to keep our country free doesn't end. If anything, the stakes are higher now than they've ever been in our lifetime.

This campaign will only be possible with the generous support of grassroots conservatives like YOU. [**I hope you'll join us by making a contribution right now. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156199:6SdZIOl1N:m:1:3253819041:7D35F3E0119D49FFD0D349EC44CF4F8E:r)

Thank you for your time.

Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate
************
PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
---

Las Vegas NV 89136

| We're never going to get back to advancing America First policies with Never Trump RINOs like Adam Kinzinger, Liz Cheney, and Mitt Romney holding us back.
These out-of-touch Establishment politicians - who have even created PACs trying to take me out \- are dead set on keeping up the Forever Wars, selling us out to foreign regimes, and sending our jobs overseas.
They would rather sell out to the mainstream media and large corporations than defend the Silent Majority. I will always stand up for the forgotten men and women of this country - but I need your help to remove the RINOs and the sellouts who have given up on us.

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: [Petition] Investigate Joe Biden's failure in Afghanistan >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HAGERTY
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157362:6Gsk-Ol3N:m:1:3253819041:8241BE0FEE66258DE692DB63F8AAB765:r)
---
Peter,
---
**Joe Biden lost the War in Afghanistan in _just 72 hours_** ... and the American people deserve to know how he failed so catastrophically. **[Will you sign my petition to Congress DEMANDING Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer open an immediate congressional investigation into Joe Biden's actions in Afghanistan?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157362:6Gsk-Ol3N:m:1:3253819041:8241BE0FEE66258DE692DB63F8AAB765:r "Will you sign my petition to Congress DEMANDING Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer open an
immediate congressional investigation into Joe Biden’s actions in Afghanistan?")**
---
| | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157362:6Gsk-Ol3N:m:1:3253819041:8241BE0FEE66258DE692DB63F8AAB765:r)
---
* **Biden FAILED** **to evacuate 30,000 Afghans** who bravely aided the US military... abandoning them to near-certain torture and execution by the Taliban.

* **Biden FAILED** **to secure U.S. military equipment** and secrets... leaving the Taliban far more powerful and better-armed than they were in 2001.

* **Biden LIED** when he assured the American people **_just 1 month ago_** that the **Taliban would NOT take over Afghanistan** ... and that any U.S. evacuation would be orderly.

The world is hungry for American strength... and the American people deserve to know how and why Joe Biden failed so completely in Afghanistan. **[Get the answers we deserve. Sign the petition now>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157362:6Gsk-Ol3N:m:1:3253819041:8241BE0FEE66258DE692DB63F8AAB765:r "Get the answers we deserve. Sign the petition now >>")**
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157362:6Gsk-Ol3N:m:1:3253819041:8241BE0FEE66258DE692DB63F8AAB765:r)
---
| Thanks, Sen. Bill Hagerty

name: Team Pelosi
subject: Please join us virtually tonight at 4pm PST / 7pm EST as we fight to Restore The Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Hello everyone: We hope you are staying safe and helping everyone you know to get vaccinated. House Democrats are delivering For The People: providing middle class tax cuts through the Biden Child Tax Credit, creating over 4 million jobs, and securing increased food assistance, rent help, and more. As we do so, we celebrate the 101 years since ratification of the 19th Amendment that guaranteed women’s constitutional right to vote. Generations of courageous women fought to be recognized as equal citizens with a right to the ballot box – including unsung women of color who would not enjoy full rights as equal citizens for decades more until passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. Our hard-won right to vote, however, is under attack from brazen Republican schemes to deny the freedom to vote and silence our voices – particularly of communities of color. To discuss our progress and underscore the fights ahead to Restore The Vote, please join Speaker Pelosi and her special guests tonight August 19th at 4:00 PM PST/ 7:00 PM EST for a lively virtual discussion. Register here: https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_TXxNH931R7iF6uwO8OHQag [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_TXxNH931R7iF6uwO8OHQag] Together, guided by the moral leadership of our beloved John Lewis, we will fully restore the soul of America and fight for a more perfect Union. Together, we will Build Back Better than ever before. Onward, Team Pelosi
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b538c5b0-f300-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/9d90d7cb-f500-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDkwZDdjYi1mNTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQj1g1nrBdPTIw9fw1Md0ekbpAghjaMmvaG-ZmliyMs=&id=117907000 .

Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Personal request for you
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

August has been a big month for our campaign, and so many of you have stepped up with your support. I’m so grateful and proud that our movement to stop DeSantis and try something new continues to grow.

Today, I’m writing to you with a personal request. New public polling shows us leading the Democratic primary for Governor and leading DeSantis among independent voters. This is a critical moment for our campaign, and we need to capitalize on this momentum.

If you’re in a position to give, your support now will make a world of difference. Please click here to chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to help us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-request?refcode=thurs819]

Our momentum is more than just numbers. People from across Florida are fed up with DeSantis. His COVID response has been a disaster because he cares far more about his standing with Trump Republicans than he does about delivering for Floridians.

But I’ve always said this campaign is about more than DeSantis. Florida’s rigged, corrupt system has left us behind for decades, and it’s time for something new.

People in Florida and across the country know that we can win this race. And while our momentum is growing, we can’t afford to let up.

That’s why I’m hoping you can step up with a contribution of $10 or more today. If you’re able, please click here to donate and help us build on our incredible momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-request?refcode=thurs819]

Thanks for standing with us in this critical fight.

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

subject: 70% off at the Official Nina Turner for Us Campaign Store

body:
This deal will only last a few weeks, so make sure you get your gear before it’s too late!
#

Hello Somebody!

---

| Peter,
---
| Our country is currently facing multiple crises due to the failed policies of Joe Biden and the radical Democrats. And now the Left is pushing for a $3.5 TRILLION spending bill written by Bernie Sanders and the far-left!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
**FIRST:** Postmaster General Louis DeJoy deliberately slowed down mail delivery times.

**THEN:** The FBI put DeJoy under a federal criminal investigation for alleged campaign finance abuses.

**NOW:** The United States Postal Service (USPS) has announced it will pay $120 million over the next five years **to a company DeJoy has financial ties to.**

Team, people are relying on the USPS more than ever before to deliver disaster relief, life-saving prescriptions, important documents, packages, and more. But DeJoy has proven time and again that he is too corrupt to be leading any federal agency -- especially an agency as essential as the USPS.

**[Last year, Karen Bass called on the Postal Service's board of governors to immediately remove Postmaster General Louis DeJoy. Now, we need to keep the pressure on to save the USPS. body:
This can’t wait
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34320891/301603168/-2023814932?refcode=20210819.3_GG_8CH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRjNWVhNy0wYTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpV7JQetGGQIGlPndP5Q50IXyVo6Z8w7Q2XQ5Yd_lPE=)

| | Hi Derek, it’s Gabby Giffords.

I’ll get straight to the point: **gun violence is a public health and safety crisis in our country.**

What’s worse, we have Republican leaders in government actively fighting against legislation that would save lives from senseless violence.

**And Derek — Terry McAuliffe’s opponent, Glenn Youngkin, is no different.**

Glenn has bragged about being a lifetime member of the NRA.

He has been officially endorsed by gun extremist former candidate Amanda Chase.

Glenn Youngkin would roll back every inch of progress Virginia Democrats have made on gun violence.

**A Glenn Youngkin governorship could literally cost us lives.**

_**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Derek. Will you chip in $25 to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign for Governor to help elect a leader who will take real action to end this public health crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34320892/301603169/-2023814932?refcode=20210819.3_GG_8CH&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRjNWVhNy0wYTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpV7JQetGGQIGlPndP5Q50IXyVo6Z8w7Q2XQ5Yd_lPE=)**_

I know that there are lifesaving solutions, and so does Terry. Take a look at his plan to protect Virginians from gun violence:
* Strengthen Virginia’s new background check law to include all firearm transfers
* Prohibit open carry of firearms in certain public spaces
* Disarm hate by preventing people who have committed hate crimes from owning firearms
* Protect Virginians from the threat of assault rifles
* Create an Office of Gun Violence Prevention to identify more solutions to gun violence

This can’t wait, Derek.

**We simply cannot afford to elect another politician who will impede our ability to address this crisis.**

name: Joan Greene
subject: [NOW] Joan Greene For Phoenix City Council
body:
I am excited to announce my candidacy for Phoenix City Council, District 6 seat. Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family, volunteer, and will always fight for.

| | | | |
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29tJTJG&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=204A212A1A2264)
---
| |
I am excited to announce my candidacy for Phoenix City Council, District 6 seat.
Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family, volunteer, and will always fight for.

The overwhelming support I received from District 6, Arizona, and the Country as a Congressional candidate demonstrated I can unite a diverse Community around our kitchen table issues.

I am running for City Council because the health and economic crisis has made it clear to all of us local elections matter.

We are faced with daunting challenges that require a combination of a bold vision and common-sense solutions:

* The homeless crisis
* Affordable and healthy housing
* Workforce development and small business support
* Public safety and accountability
* Environmental protection
* End corruption and government waste

Striving for win-win outcomes will help us grow and prosper together. We achieve this when we elect people whose focus is community interest and not self-interest.

Please join me as we travel down the path for a better tomorrow!

Our community. Our future.

Visit JoanGreeneAZ.com to get to know me and our campaign.

****
---
| | Thank you,
\- Joan Greene

---

clean_body: I am excited to announce my candidacy for Phoenix City Council, District 6 seat. Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family, volunteer, and will always fight for. | | | | | | | | | I am excited to announce my candidacy for Phoenix City Council, District 6 seat. Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family, volunteer, and will always fight for. The overwhelming support I received from District 6, Arizona, and the Country as a Congressional candidate demonstrated I can unite a diverse Community around our kitchen table issues. I am running for City Council because the health and economic crisis has made it clear to all of us local elections matter. We are faced with daunting challenges that require a combination of a bold vision and common-sense solutions: The homeless crisis Affordable and healthy housing Workforce development and small business support Public safety and accountability Environmental protection End corruption and government waste Striving for win-win outcomes will help us grow and prosper together. We achieve this when we elect people whose focus is community interest and not self-interest. Please join me as we travel down the path for a better tomorrow! Our community. Our future. Visit JoanGreeneAZ.com to get to know me and our campaign. | | Thank you, \- Joan Greene | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Joan Greene For Congress, 4802 East Ray Road , Suite 23-134, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States

| | Peter, Did you see the latest state that has followed the lead of Arizona in the fight for secure elections? **Inspired by the historic, full forensic audit of ballots in Maricopa County - aka, America 's Audit - _legislators in Wisconsin just recently issued subpoenas for election materials in two counties!_** Thanks to the movement launched by grassroots patriots like you, the Grand Canyon State is leading the way for free and fair elections!
---
| [KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58156866:6BY47OlFN:m:1:3253819041:2769BD95791F4CDD7D2830C949104DCF:r "KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM!")
---
| It's great to know that the courage of Arizona State Senators - and the full backing of our entire Election Integrity movement - is inspiring people across the country. With each passing day, more and more are realizing the necessity of having secure, transparent, and fair elections - **_YOU_ are helping restore confidence in the bedrock of our republic!**

clean_body: (Please do not forward to Democrats.) | Thanks for taking a moment to read this update, Peter. Here’s where things stand: Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott is under attack in the Battleground State of South Carolina, where Democrats spent $130 million last election to seize control. Trump-Endorsed Senator Marco Rubio is under daily attack by Democrat Val Demings, a close ally of Nancy Pelosi who led the Left’s effort to impeach President Trump. If either South Carolina or Florida fall, our hopes of reclaiming the Republican Senate Majority are completely lost. Both Tim Scott and Marco Rubio have President Trump’s Complete and Total Endorsement, and we’re doing everything that we can to ensure their re-election. But without immediate Grassroots Republican support, they’re at risk of falling permanently behind. | | | | | | | | | | Money isn’t the only thing that matters in politics. We know that. But without the necessary funds, there’s no way that these must-win campaigns can keep up with the Democrats and win. We need to send them immediate reinforcements before they’re overrun. Will you help, Peter? Thank you. Battleground Senate Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: =?utf-8?Q?Roger=20Marshall?=
subject: re: What Biden got wrong about Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Marshall
body:
Shame on our president.

https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/what-biden-got-wrong?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021aug19hf
I supported President Trump’s decision to leave Afghanistan — but Joe Biden’s execution of the withdrawal has been a disaster.

Biden and his team have gotten it wrong every single step of the way:

➤ Biden said it was “highly unlikely” the Taliban would be “overrunning everything” — WRONG

➤ Biden said we’ll withdraw “responsibly, deliberately, and safely” — WRONG

➤ Jake Sullivan said the Taliban “guaranteed” a safe journey for Americans to the Kabul airport — WRONG

➤ Secretary of State Blinken said “This is manifestly not Saigon” — WRONG

They all got it horribly wrong. Now, our country has been humiliated on the world stage and up to 15,000 Americans are stranded in Afghanistan with NO guarantee of safety.

It’s humiliating. It’s heartbreaking. And it’s enraging.

Joe Biden failed us — and so has every single member of his party that’s refused to demand accountability for this total failure of leadership.

If Republicans win back the U.S. Senate, believe me, there will be a full investigation into how they got this so wrong — and those responsible will be held accountable.

name: Kelly Dietrich
subject: [News] Introducing Our Honorary Co-Chairs!

body:
| hint: they're three extraordinary Congresswomen

Peter — Exciting news! NDTC is thrilled to announce **Reps. Katie Porter (CA-45)** , **Lauren Underwood (IL-14)** , and **Nikema Williams (GA-05)** as our Honorary Co-Chairs! We’re ecstatic to have these incredible leaders join our team. As co-chairs, they will help spread the word about our tools and trainings to current and aspiring candidates, campaign teams, and progressive organizational leaders who want to improve their communities through the political process but aren’t sure where to start. Here’s what our new co-chairs had to say about joining the team! ⤵️ | [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Lf8-E7sO3p2dDR906CaHRClHZsOgdyjqw6Ahnn9egB8)
---
_But the news doesn’t stop there!_
We’re also excited to share that we will be hosting special events with our new co-chairs over the next few weeks.
**First, join me for a special live Q &A with Reps. Porter and Underwood on September 14 at noon ET! **
It’s not every day you get to ask a member of Congress for their trusted tips and tricks when running for office — so don’t wait, or you might miss your chance!
[**RSVP now to reserve your spot for this exciting panel before it's too late!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..p1U0153ykg62VwRIp0kapoNvPZqorscdYW5BsYnJT6w)

---
Then, keep your eyes on your inbox for the announcement of a special event with Rep. Williams later in the month.
_We promise, the details are worth the wait._
[**In the meantime, check out this article to learn more about today’s news and our new co-chairs!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-0nbMr9wiKBquJ38Wn4rl8NUM38nsJ2jXJj0DnyUhU0)

More soon,
— Kelly

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The Left is not letting up. We aren’t either!
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As a strong supporter of Judicial Watch, you know how we are working hard every day to fight _for_ the rule of law and _against_ public corruption and unlawful government secrecy. Some of our most recent efforts include:

* _Exposing and challenging_ Biden administration secrecy on the border crisis...a crisis which, among other dangers, includes a spike in sex offenders entering the U.S. illegally after the Biden team shut down deportations.

* _Exposing and challenging_ Big Tech censorship of conservative free speech... _including your Judicial Watch 's First Amendment protected speech_;

* _Suing_ for state government records related to the massive Cuomo administration cover-up of nursing home Covid-19 deaths in New York State;

* _Forcing_ the release of government records detailing U.S. government grants from the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), headed by Dr. Anthony Fauci, to the infamous Wuhan Institute of Virology in China;

* _Using_ state open-records laws to expose the Left's drive to spread the Marxist, anti-American "critical race theory" in our schools and military training, and

* _Helping_ win key victories at the U.S. Supreme Court in defense of honest elections and your First Amendment rights!

| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56456&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTkxNDA0MzI=)
---

Eight months into the Biden presidency, **_the Left is not letting up_**** _one bit_** in corruptly using its power to radically transform America...and as our investigations and lawsuits prove, **_they will use any tool, including unlawful government secrecy and censorship of conservative voices, to achieve their goals._**

Frankly, I fear our Republic is teetering from persistent attacks by the organized Left and corrupt politicians of both parties. And I can think of no group better able to stand strong for the rule of law and our threatened U.S. Constitution than your Judicial Watch.

**_[That's why I ask you to make your best tax-deductible contribution today to Judicial Watch.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56456&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTkxNDA0MzI=)_** Your support today is critical for us to continue to be the most effective conservative government watchdog group in America. And it will help Judicial Watch respond effectively as we fight for you and for America.

**_[Thank you for your making your best donation today to Judicial Watch.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56456&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTkxNDA0MzI=)_**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56456&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MTkxNDA0MzI=)

clean_body: Democrats are pushing to bring back mask mandates... | | PeterーDemocrats are pushing to bring back mask mandates, incorporate vax passports, and potentially institute new lockdowns. ⬇⬇⬇ Democrats want to reinstitute mask mandates and prolong this crisis because it has given them the excuse they need to control every aspect of Americans’ lives. Jeff Bartos is already out campaigning against this next crackdown on your liberties, and rest assured, if he gets to the Senate, he’ll fight tooth and nail against these restrictions. We’ve put together this petition asking grassroots conservatives like yourself to stand against more mask mandatesー Peter, these mask mandates, restrictions on small businesses, and lockdowns must come to an end. Now is the time for Americans to get back to normal. It’s time for small businesses to start recovering and for the American economy to restart again. Thank you, Team Bartos | | | Paid for by Bartos for US Senate | | 1152 Mae Street #129, Hummelstown, PA, 17036 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

We know what you’re thinking, maybe it is some.. Peterーdid you catch this INSANE HEADLINE from _the Washington Free Beacon_?
⬇⬇⬇

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b9aadc7bc5f24f80a379731587ffb1d7&_e=zLPAbj2bNu4TEAPRjqbfa0LzxYYzC3f6znBAWAYaO7EgmehHjknEyru08V6L3pB6jmwi-Z--9BpMIW7hqeg6MC76YXL8MmEosPZ4wUsYyAsdSFi54C4dX0fqoaPnGURnDH6GHvMoMao61OwsnPWvh6fxi0s4qpaEzGMh8_PaMoX5tNyo_NAuiwZxUB_m8mM7w_O8wuNd2Zw-0oZ0vvVfTKpIG7W1WnKrdSTiZU6CNZ0cMvnpn338bbPZuPfLLv1fhxxA6eKQ7F5-CG18DnrJadVsOlrFAtM9Ll8UZoK_mRtnzryqMOuM580ACqJpRnQZVBVG1dyoh2lzNVZBIN6RIYDc7QvU65rFpR2leSLMhD-K3NJgjfA5ycc10ZDOvyBrOHuMOmTcdw6iFWRFt5OXyeArb9DznnxYV3gGDHY_9aBPj7f0_imXa0wDOCidWg7sgb5wLxdDWty-wroA1B9l5EbdFUcQWA2aR7Xi45aPpCgtZsIcfRpHuwnP9_g09Kkw)

We know what you’re thinking; maybe it is some low-level radical Democrat with no real influence or power...

_**Except this came from the head of the Minneapolis Democrat Party!**_

Let’s make something clear here; when the Minneapolis police department was burned down, it was an _**ACT OF TERROR**_ ; there was nothing righteous about this:

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b9aadc7bc5f24f80a379731587ffb1d7&_e=zLPAbj2bNu4TEAPRjqbfa0LzxYYzC3f6znBAWAYaO7EgmehHjknEyru08V6L3pB6jmwi-Z--9BpMIW7hqeg6MC76YXL8MmEosPZ4wUsYyAsdSFi54C4dX0fqoaPnGURnDH6GHvMoMao61OwsnPWvh6fxi0s4qpaEzGMh8_PaMoX5tNyo_NAuiwZxUB_m8mM7w_O8wuNd2Zw-0oZ0vvVfTKpIG7W1WnKrdSTiZU6CNZ0cMvnpn338bbPZuPfLLv1fhxxA6eKQ7F5-CG18DnrJadVsOlrFAtM9Ll8UZoK_mRvYdRkhitY2ExzUS6tW-gj6MnD0xYULz_OUU-kW5NkC10EnziyBgJ4J5WYw5qY-ahwy-8AIGpr-O1ii7yRFG5p2NDbvQ6O76rzbZ1eN6Cf1-0sVL7ASqEwBya51HoXAzmd7G421oynbdhbiHIb308TfCO_b461jwwB4-3dbd9xmabMjgwkgXjrJwXrrFGd-6wvteY1lI7yVtNbr7i-gpzjX)

Peter, it’s clear from the uptick in attacks and shootings against police, radicals like this have painted a target on every single police officer in this country.

Andrew is up in Congress right now fighting this growing anti-police movement spreading across the country.

_[**Peter, while Andrew is stepping up in Congress to defeat this radical movement, could you help fund his fight with a small donation today?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b9aadc7bc5f24f80a379731587ffb1d7&_e=zLPAbj2bNu4TEAPRjqbfa0LzxYYzC3f6znBAWAYaO7EgmehHjknEyru08V6L3pB6jmwi-Z--9BpMIW7hqeg6MC76YXL8MmEosPZ4wUsYyAsdSFi54C4dX0fqoaPnGURnDH6GHvMoMao61OwsnPWvh6fxi0s4qpaEzGMh8_PaMoX5tNyo_NAuiwZxUB_m8mM7w_O8wuNd2Zw-0oZ0vvVfTKpIG7W1WnKrdSTiZU6CNZ0cMvnpn338bbPZuPfLLv1fhxxA6eKQ7F5-CG18DnrJadVsOlrFAtM9Ll8UZoK_mRtLhTiF8XilH1vOCzPoiKH4YiwYLdEMeou2eZ1ZroXy8_2ZqV27R4zGypcA1fKPBven1PBKvBMawRq444ydyOAmrYq7gkf0VbR3Jcm31o9am-JP6NOYpZ2OGvE3PMCVfSd3-htSMl9Syv4hbifueG-Lzs22aLiCZeVvlXO-HHo3oBIQO72ZZvQtovnyQ_AcBGYQt8CS7eAHhIT7R4QwFdWL)_
[**PROTECT OUR POLICE**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b9aadc7bc5f24f80a379731587ffb1d7&_e=zLPAbj2bNu4TEAPRjqbfa0LzxYYzC3f6znBAWAYaO7EgmehHjknEyru08V6L3pB6jmwi-Z--9BpMIW7hqeg6MC76YXL8MmEosPZ4wUsYyAsdSFi54C4dX0fqoaPnGURnDH6GHvMoMao61OwsnPWvh6fxi0s4qpaEzGMh8_PaMoX5tNyo_NAuiwZxUB_m8mM7w_O8wuNd2Zw-0oZ0vvVfTKpIG7W1WnKrdSTiZU6CNZ0cMvnpn338bbPZuPfLLv1fhxxA6eKQ7F5-CG18DnrJadVsOlrFAtM9Ll8UZoK_mRtCCol153ONrMpW5i5YES-t1d2VWynS5nBamD-IsvjzANBIl_W_jZCqKRELX4T-4iSO5js7wwEomsvMbQDzY0waROCk0JIIXqWSVstoktQSHkjINSHLhQW9MWDeBG6XhNF3RalcvgYi8FZk4c86pSJk1ynLxn_ofMMf0fk_U3B29A9qksU6egQbFeYytzKBZODrPkD9vUeloIS2XVHKNZrK)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Twitter Terrorists
body:
My sources along with media reports have made it clear: Big Tech is offering their multi-billion-dollar platforms to terrorists.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg) My sources along with media reports have made it clear: **Big Tech is offering their multi-billion-dollar platforms to terrorists**.

Up until yesterday, the Taliban had been using Facebook's WhatsApp to coordinate their terrorist activities in Afghanistan.

The rapid takeover of Afghanistan was made possible with the messaging tool WhatsApp, which is owned by Mark Zuckerberg's Facebook.

For years, I have been screaming about the presence of Islamic terrorists on sites like Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. This isn't a new phenomenon.

If you recall, CAIR, an Islamic terrorist organization even lobbied Twitter to remove my account.

As for Twitter, they're allowing the Taliban to operate freely on their platform despite the group being sanctioned as a terrorist organization under U.S. Law.

Twitter acknowledged that they will continue to allow Taliban communication and coordination to take place on Twitter despite the fact that the Taliban is carrying out a murderous rampage in Afghanistan as I write this email to you.

As President Trump remains permanently banned over fears of "inciting violence", an actual Islamic terrorist group is allowed to operate on Twitter!

This has to end!

[**Help fund my new lawsuit against Big Tech. Help me stop them.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)
The Taliban's spokesman, Zabihullah Mujahid, is on Twitter with 321k followers and growing.

And thanks to Jack Dorsey and Twitter, the Taliban is quickly gaining support around the world.

A Twitter user named Mohammad Abbas from Pakistan tweeted:
_Congratulations to the Taliban on their victory over Americans and against NATO. May Allah help the Taliban to run an ideal Islamic government in Afghanistan._
And as American troops are arriving to retake Kabul airport to safely evacuate people, Twitter is allowing coordination like this with Taliban leaders:
_The tower of Kabul Airfield should not be taken over by the Americans. They should destroy "this system" after it arrives._ - Taliban supporter to Zabihullah Mujahid
**Facebook and Twitter are aiding and abetting terrorists!**
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)
Yet, here in the United States, we can't even discuss COVID without censorship! We can't share our conservative views without being banned! A sitting United States President was banned from Twitter, but Islamic terrorists are free to tweet.

This should be eye-opening to you - it was to me. And it has been for years.

This is no longer just about censorship.
**Twitter is a national security threat, an argument I 've been making for years.** [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)
**Twitter is allowing terrorists to organize and coordinate the killing of American soldiers and innocent Afghans who are fleeing for their lives.**

It's happening as you read this email!

An administration that took national security seriously would have Twitter shut down by the morning - but we know that won't happen under the Biden Regime.

So we'll have to [**stop them ourselves**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg), and the best immediate shot we have is forcing them to change through the courts . . . and **that 's exactly what I'm doing**.

The cost has been great to me. Every spare dime I have is going to fund my legal work and [**I need your help more than ever**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg).

[**Chip in as much as you can if you can help.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)

Thanks so much for your support and please, help me keep fighting.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Tomorrow I have a call with my attorneys to go over the final draft of my initial court filing. During that call, I expect to hear that my retainer has been depleted because this case is MASSIVE. [**Please give me a hand to keep going.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/I1gvCCwmG99Mrq763eyLfeRA/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/4n5hqIVQxAeoTCoSfPyAKg)

name: Kolin Kearns
subject: Tell Congress: Don’t cut one penny from climate solutions
body:
| | Friend, Last week’s report from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change sent a clear message to world leaders: We cannot afford to delay climate action any longer. **We don’t have to read this report to know the truth about climate change. From record-breaking wildfires to deadly floods, disaster is already at our doorstep.** Unless our leaders quickly change course, the widespread and worsening impacts of the climate crisis will devastate our communities. **Thankfully, there’s still cause for hope.** Here in the United States, Democrats in Congress are on the verge of passing one of the most significant pieces of climate legislation in our history — but we can’t ease up just yet. Over the coming days, we must ensure not one penny of climate solutions is cut from the final budget. [Urge Congress to keep bold climate action in the final budget reconciliation package.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34328136/301628898/-1396135952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY5OTBiMS0xZjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4P8yzwJ0Moc01jmSktsZDe6VJKyxyOUfhnCcvtO9jo=&emci=56791daa-1f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f0f990b1-1f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) With a simple majority vote, Democrats can pass a $3.5 trillion budget proposal that would:
* Implement a clean energy standard to get us to 80 percent clean electricity by 2030
* Create a new Civilian Climate Corps to train and hire thousands of young people to restore public lands and improve climate resilience for frontline communities
* Boost tax incentives to promote cleaner energy, transportation, and manufacturing
* Eliminate many tax subsidies for fossil fuel corporations and make polluters pay to clean up their messes
* Deliver 40 percent of climate investments to communities hardest hit by climate change and pollution
* Invest in retrofitting and constructing energy efficient houses, businesses, and public buildings

For the first time in years, we have a real chance to pass major climate legislation at the national level. This is our moment to make transformative change and put us on a path to 100 percent clean energy and a safer, more prosperous future. Together, we can make it happen. [Tell Congress to pass a fully-funded Civilian Climate Corps, national clean energy standard, and other climate solutions via budget reconciliation.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34328137/301628900/1097476568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY5OTBiMS0xZjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4P8yzwJ0Moc01jmSktsZDe6VJKyxyOUfhnCcvtO9jo=&emci=56791daa-1f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f0f990b1-1f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) Thank you, Kolin Kearns
National Digital Campaigns Manager
NextGen America
---

Friends – My team just informed me that **two McConnell-linked super PACs unleashed massive amounts of dark money into New Hampshire, specifically targeting my campaign.** They're pledging to spend _tens of millions of dollars_ against me to flip the Senate. Top Republicans are laser-focused on my race – just last week, Betsy DeVos announced that she’s visiting New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. Mike Pence headlined a massive GOP fundraiser in New Hampshire and said himself that the Granite State is ground zero for taking back the Senate. And Donald Trump is personally recruiting a far-right Republican to run against me. Having this many attacks this early on in the campaign is not a good sign, friend. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. And now, in 2022, experts are saying New Hampshire is the most vulnerable Senate seat in the country. **If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim Senate majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade.** If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, my team and I will need as much help as we can get. That is why I'm asking for your support. **[If you can, please consider donating today. clean_body: Here’s why... | Joe Biden is destroying our country! He’s opened our borders, closed our schools, and abandoned thousands of American Citizens to the Taliban. And he’s giving free-reign to the socialist “squad” in Congress to gut our election laws, end private property rights, and spend us trillions deeper into debt. That’s why this rally is so important. President Trump’s leadership can turn everything around and build momentum towards a Republican LANDSLIDE in the Midterm Elections. | | With so much at stake, we’re not holding anything back. Republicans have set a goal of raising$1 MILLION before President Trump steps on stage to show that we’re 100% behind him in the fight to SAVE AMERICA. This is a huge opportunity that we can’t afford to miss, Peter. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. President Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Do you know what I miss about President Trump?
body:
He is blunt, fearless, and never backed down from a fight.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c5pFx1l5eVfVNVodCNxdw-UaqyFU217juAtgVcKfQPWQ5IEejs7TK-B2jgAojlf4y1a8C7uX8yuIzGCTOsaGX4PHKu-WmfqnpUDkuJkod-dRTXw6b-Vc7Mxkm0WIxgW7wHWS4dTbaKd5eKGd-m21J3dapkigJJ01Z5lLnxlT4202UMPnzrX39A==&c=_YXZ0fKXpFwkhQFyOGz6JwmKeP1YVtgS26vXpEu37XCXnThcs0WXOg==&ch=FO-tAccc-9XdoJ4SXx2eGIFfLK_SrVuGuEf_OvpmABdfqAxIZIs0bQ==)
---
| Peter,
I see a lot of myself in President Trump. Like me, he is a businessman, not a politician. He is blunt, fearless, and never backed down from a fight.
President Trump did many great things while he was in office.

* He started building the wall and made border security a priority.
* He cut taxes and regulations creating the strongest economy in a generation.
* He stood with our allies, rebuilt our military, and brought peace to the Middle East.
* He spoke out for life and religious liberty.

Unfortunately, the Left is working around the clock to destroy everything President Trump accomplished during his time in office.
And to make matters worse, I do not trust the spineless Republican establishment to stand up to the Left as Trump did.
[Like President Trump, I will stand up to the Left, drain the swamp, and fight for America. Please consider donating $5, $10, or even $20.22 today to support our campaign >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c5pFx1l5eVfVNVodCNxdw-UaqyFU217juAtgVcKfQPWQ5IEejs7TK-B2jgAojlf4y1a8C7uX8yuIzGCTOsaGX4PHKu-WmfqnpUDkuJkod-dRTXw6b-Vc7Mxkm0WIxgW7wHWS4dTbaKd5eKGd-m21J3dapkigJJ01Z5lLnxlT4202UMPnzrX39A==&c=_YXZ0fKXpFwkhQFyOGz6JwmKeP1YVtgS26vXpEu37XCXnThcs0WXOg==&ch=FO-tAccc-9XdoJ4SXx2eGIFfLK_SrVuGuEf_OvpmABdfqAxIZIs0bQ==)
The Left knew President Trump was a threat to their power, and they did everything they could to destroy him. I expect my campaign will be no different.
I was proud to support Donald Trump. I raised money, gave speeches around the state, and worked hard to help him WIN.
Now, the Left is targeting me because I supported President Trump.

clean_body: He is blunt, fearless, and never backed down from a fight. | | | | | | == | Peter, I see a lot of myself in President Trump. Like me, he is a businessman, not a politician. He is blunt, fearless, and never backed down from a fight. President Trump did many great things while he was in office. He started building the wall and made border security a priority. He cut taxes and regulations creating the strongest economy in a generation. He stood with our allies, rebuilt our military, and brought peace to the Middle East. He spoke out for life and religious liberty. Unfortunately, the Left is working around the clock to destroy everything President Trump accomplished during his time in office. And to make matters worse, I do not trust the spineless Republican establishment to stand up to the Left as Trump did. == The Left knew President Trump was a threat to their power, and they did everything they could to destroy him. I expect my campaign will be no different. I was proud to support Donald Trump. I raised money, gave speeches around the state, and worked hard to help him WIN. Now, the Left is targeting me because I supported President Trump. Please click a link below to support our campaign against the Left. == == == == == == == == In Liberty, | | Mike Gibbons Candidate for US Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

subject: Going hungry (child tax credit).
body:
a 24% decrease in the percent of households with children who don't have enough to eat. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329026/301632185/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgzODFkMC0yMjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=625HpPjBViw-d3YOx2IIS8KdRsXASgXuSr2hyXpomLk=)
**[Friend -- In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in $3 to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. But first, let me tell you about something Democrats just did that's having a HUGE impact for the students I teach.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329027/301632186/-686739743?refcode=em-08192021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgzODFkMC0yMjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=625HpPjBViw-d3YOx2IIS8KdRsXASgXuSr2hyXpomLk=)**

Yesterday marked the first day back to school in my community, and the transition has been one of both stress and great relief. It was only months ago when families were lining up at food banks because folks were out of work and kids were out of school.

**One thing Democrats in Congress did to ease the burden for working families was pass the expanded child tax credit. That extra money is going a long way for school supplies and in putting food on the table.**

After this credit was disbursed, _Politico_ reported a 24% decrease in the percent of households with children who don't have enough to eat. As you know, kids in the Central Valley struggle more than most, so this had a huge impact here.

Friend, how someone could know that our kids are struggling, but vote against this child tax credit is beyond comprehension. **Yet that's exactly what Kevin McCarthy did.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329028/301632187/-686739743?refcode=em-08192021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgzODFkMC0yMjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=625HpPjBViw-d3YOx2IIS8KdRsXASgXuSr2hyXpomLk=)
I often hear from kids who are facing financial challenges at home.

It's hard to hear these stories every day and not feel compelled to do something about it. It's one of the main reasons I wanted to run for office. It's shameful that McCarthy hears these stories, ignores them, and then plays political games to advance his career.

**It's time for McCarthy to go, but defeating him will take a whole lot of grassroots support from across California and the rest of the country.**

**[I need a boost from you today -- 16 donations from your area before midnight -- to send a strong message to McCarthy that his time is up. clean_body: a 24% decrease in the percent of households with children who don't have enough to eat. | = = Yesterday marked the first day back to school in my community, and the transition has been one of both stress and great relief. It was only months ago when families were lining up at food banks because folks were out of work and kids were out of school. One thing Democrats in Congress did to ease the burden for working families was pass the expanded child tax credit. That extra money is going a long way for school supplies and in putting food on the table. After this credit was disbursed, Politico reported a 24% decrease in the percent of households with children who don't have enough to eat. As you know, kids in the Central Valley struggle more than most, so this had a huge impact here. Friend, how someone could know that our kids are struggling, but vote against this child tax credit is beyond comprehension. Yet that's exactly what Kevin McCarthy did. = I often hear from kids who are facing financial challenges at home. It's hard to hear these stories every day and not feel compelled to do something about it. It's one of the main reasons I wanted to run for office. It's shameful that McCarthy hears these stories, ignores them, and then plays political games to advance his career. It's time for McCarthy to go, but defeating him will take a whole lot of grassroots support from across California and the rest of the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Marisa Wood Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: How you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Dear Peter,

Watching the devastating situation unfold in Afghanistan has been sobering and painful for all of us.

A single email cannot adequately express the difficulty of the situation, and there are no easy solutions to a crisis with such a complicated and long history. But there are actions we can take to help, and we can draw hope from the people and organizations who are dedicated to this critical work.

One nonprofit that I'm drawing hope from today is the Lutheran Immigration and Refugee Service (LIRS). The LIRS is dedicated to helping Afghan refugees and asylum seekers settle in the Seattle and Tacoma areas -- as well as across the country.

**If you live in Tacoma or Seattle and you 've been wondering what you could do to help: [The LIRS is seeking volunteers in our area to assist with airport pickups, meal services, and more. You can learn more about the LIRS and opportunities to help here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lOS_vGTLCRrSW1eKEU6XThd5UQ58ydFpWbew6LNnzwg=/pMDRIY1UJYLHWqQh-3WE9ZYoxmnPqI4HfBPPxeSeND8=)**

As the events in Afghanistan continue to unfold, it's my hope that America will mirror the people of our region and work together as a nation to welcome and support all refugees seeking asylum and safety.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lOS_vGTLCRrSW1eKEU6XThd5UQ58ydFpWbew6LNnzwg=/8qSAhIyQAF9D-hecowPdeMEFHJkRLlZVG95VsOMceME=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lOS_vGTLCRrSW1eKEU6XThd5UQ58ydFpWbew6LNnzwg=/wA6w01qxPRObAzh48K6WnzV6rCmtxHmANfYM9e2IroA=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/lOS_vGTLCRrSW1eKEU6XThd5UQ58ydFpWbew6LNnzwg=/bymhdtr6Dd7zdw9oM2xK5WhNk325sta1XtF3O09viJM=).

They want to: ❌ Open our borders ❌ Allow **MILLIONS** of illegal immigrants to enter our nation ❌ **DEFUND** our border security This is unacceptable, Peter. It is now estimated that more than 1.7 million illegal immigrants will enter our nation by the end of 2021. And if that isn't enough, **more than 18 percent of migrant families and 20 percent of unaccompanied minors who recently crossed the border tested positive for Covid. **This administration has locked down our country because of the pandemic but allows a FREE PASS to immigrants!
