name: Mark Walker
subject: It’s time to make President Biden a one-term President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
I hardly recognize our country these days. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/b8a9f2afa2ae1974c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, I can’t believe how much our country has changed since President Biden took power in January. He ran as a “moderate” Democrat, but his actions have proved him to be the puppet of radical socialists. His leftist policies have led to:
* **A stunningly failed plan to exit Afghanistan**. In a matter of hours, Taliban forces seized control of the country and American military assets such as numerous Blackhawk helicopters.
* **A failing economy**. Just go to the grocery store or fill up your gas tank, and you’ll feel the pain of this administration's inflation.
* **A major border crisis**. Illegal immigrants are streaming across our southern border, but President Biden and Kamala Harris are MIA.
* **A sustained attack on our energy independence**. President Biden scrapped plans to build a pipeline that would have given Americans more control over our energy resources.
* **A spineless response to Communist China**. The Biden Administration refuses to stand up to an evil regime that caused COVID-19 and the deaths of more than 600,000 Americans.

[**STOP THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/b490c22155d595aac3d6b838967d376c/35903) **It couldn’t be clearer, Peter. We are currently living through the most left-wing president in our nation’s history, and he must be stopped**. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in the great state of North Carolina – to FIGHT the socialists’ agenda and limit President Biden to one term. **[I hope you’ll join me by making a generous contribution to my campaign today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/2d4d4809c82f7bcec3d6b838967d376c/35903)**. With your help, we can keep North Carolina red and win back the Senate next year. _President Biden’s Administration is taking our country down a dangerous path, and THIS is our opportunity to hold him accountable for the damage he’s doing_. It won’t be easy, but with your support and God’s help, we can get the job done. Thank you in advance, Mark Walker [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/031bc3c023341b88c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/f938d5b1b6690cc9c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/82c6672909e00717c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/3bed059daf5f5702c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/a15547dfb5ab7461c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0dd5d3886fc377f5/106ae167dfb748c1c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I served in Afghanistan. Joe Biden Is Lying.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157455:6BruPOlNd:m:1:3253819041:20381BF96DC04428AAB9070CEC2907AF:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Since then, many have asked me if it was worth it. Here's what I tell them:

Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that.

But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused.

Joe Biden is a liar, and he deserves 100% of the blame for the oncoming humanitarian crisis.

So, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to [join me in fighting to defeat Joe Biden](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157455:6BruPOlNd:m:1:3253819041:20381BF96DC04428AAB9070CEC2907AF:r), but first let me tell you how I know he's lying...

On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I'd step left...and then right...left...and then right. Then...BANG!

The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home.

One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America.

Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Instead, he is more focused on the "optics" of the situation. Trying to blame everyone but himself.

**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that leaders take responsibility for their actions. Joe Biden is refusing to do that, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. **

[If you agree, please help me hold him accountable and stop his disastrous America Last agenda](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58157455:6BruPOlNd:m:1:3253819041:20381BF96DC04428AAB9070CEC2907AF:r):

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Since then, many have asked me if it was worth it. Here's what I tell them: Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that. But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused. Joe Biden is a liar, and he deserves 100% of the blame for the oncoming humanitarian crisis. So, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to , but first let me tell you how I know he's lying... On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I'd step left...and then right...left...and then right. Then...BANG! The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home. One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America. Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Instead, he is more focused on the "optics" of the situation. Trying to blame everyone but himself. Another lesson I learned in the Army is that leaders take responsibility for their actions. Joe Biden is refusing to do that, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. : | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT" | This cause is incredibly personal to me, and the stakes couldn't be higher. name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: McConnell’s revenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Patty Murray said I could reach out to you today because Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.
#
Peter,
I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate.
Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm.
**Now, my Democratic Senate colleague Patty Murray said I could reach out to you today because Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.**
In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a $5 to support my campaign and Patty Murray and defend our hard-won Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329849/301634653/-389040696?refcode=pm_em_210819_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYzc4Ni0yNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q56Jw6uNQ_0Ij9QfIaHmlio3c0UoklAcN-txAT-fgY=)** I hope you’ll let me explain -- because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.
I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has just officially announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**
CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and The Cook Political Report just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me.
That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat -- and Senator Murray thought I should reach out. I’m counting on you to rush a donation to help us defend the Senate. **[Please, will you split $5 right now between my campaign and Patty Murray to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329850/301634654/-389040696?refcode=pm_em_210819_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYzc4Ni0yNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q56Jw6uNQ_0Ij9QfIaHmlio3c0UoklAcN-txAT-fgY=)**
Thank you so much for your support.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine Cortez Masto

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329851/301634655/-389040696?refcode=pm_em_210819_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYzc4Ni0yNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q56Jw6uNQ_0Ij9QfIaHmlio3c0UoklAcN-txAT-fgY=)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bf7a3c4b-0701-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/d941c786-2601-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYzc4Ni0yNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q56Jw6uNQ_0Ij9QfIaHmlio3c0UoklAcN-txAT-fgY=&id=115197541). Join us today in fighting for progressive values: [donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34329852/301634656/-1835341818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQxYzc4Ni0yNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q56Jw6uNQ_0Ij9QfIaHmlio3c0UoklAcN-txAT-fgY=).

subject: Mike is stepping up to lead. Here’s what you might have missed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
President Biden’s chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan is among the worst-executed foreign policy decisions in modern American history. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3yvTLCT0iVpUDxEGmqegRVVsSXz6GB7c7Q3tma8fHZEGK1xj-OttWmTNYJB33B__QRDGPiBbgPzPMgPuU4ULDMBqTHKLOxYDelPsEinPzBWQQ2PP1RMHAVZV8FSb-WYeUiddN-CmTYl5DTBjCrij9RshTIXd_Q7GkAFellRbmc-76XV8NDl_te-DZboQvPWtI8_ZVKPhLluKyrAfkQIfg5yEf2SSYVKnHivE9Ovpdh8WDiV8dQbARA4d0301N3OJiAlyB6c_CArpeyQSqg9aVUmRyqpsOqPcwV9tw7JMv4RMMvrL3QJ10z1Lc1r9YoyEmgVQ_JdHQjI19Xepbp0rjvKt6PAEwJUS11QanBibwypD_0EoISCIPPwKLI_N4BjQSOstzquv0rrGWA9tRX583aTwayUCx3hOzpNBsZ2rwS1y8OoCcfPqOGaaWLyIkXFxac7jBnfR_zhDBM4VGeBUKxE%3D) Peter, President Biden’s chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan is among the worst-executed foreign policy decisions in modern American history. **While the President, Vice President, and White House Press Secretary have been avoiding the American people in the midst of this crisis, Congressman Gallagher has been stepping up to provide much-needed leadership. ** In case you missed them, I wanted to share a few of Mike’s statements on the situation and draw your attention to the recent interviews he’s given. [**_[WATCH] REP. GALLAGHER ON MSNBC WITH HALLIE JACKSON_**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BGN5HZfBJBvIBg8pBdXKw0FdTbE95J2BihzHTB3S9pvZLzJq4uv60ufG-YMMSvnHEkkrKGoIyZKqSXswFwql3hjA3o2tHujA8tG5BZpZI1jKsqfmzteETb6sVUmRL4UhMtZ5v6UH_srrZjW0WajwN1ebtI_cANRy_PK8mvO_F02L1v9KAIqvQcje9I_bmT-fxyL9w4F7tBhW-3wi-XK66d2CZdKogNf5gc-qMjgETL1ZmJHn-To_54CLAQWfu0e-f8_sB-Q_3CBoz60-1ZDCIxRHHPMgOryF5oPaKi2xuyG1YNShyHSAykhdUAMzl6lt_x4bfcpfN4dc-FDeUyNAP_B-Ojajtfi-x1mTGGeDcV8xlHkjBuncNTJi2GXtUSV7xk6UP_1bRhmOluSDHkfuF7A1AusC-xmcXRdM7d198XJog%3D%3D) | |
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BGN5HZfBJBvIBg8pBdXKw0FdTbE95J2BihzHTB3S9pvZLzJq4uv60ufG-YMMSvnHEkkrKGoIyZKqSXswFwql3hjA3o2tHujA8tG5BZpZI1jKsqfmzteETb6sVUmRL4UhMtZ5v6UH_srrZjW0WajwN1ebtI_cANRy_PK8mvO_F02L1v9KAIqvQcje9I_bmT-fxygbKBLUey1elgMIPr_GB54c0aiZLNFxYWv3mCXwect6wnyRJ7-yidCf_xs7t5NUp7VSowtMZnb7dZXan4R5tl2Bp7JTrargY4SlfnZWx_ohdrr5ptW0KXo3Sewt5EFeJd61yckS2xeuNuduFS5Z0g5FRqXnGw5KPxj8WeNrAAGCQ9Az2f59vtVqdgIbhniCtdNN7PIj4cea0oVPyo193g1n6n74SSUg9-XJC5TX6z0yA%3D%3D)
|
---
**Bottom Line:**_“We have bungled this withdrawal. It's been a catastrophe. There's no going back, we've had the Saigon moment. Now we need to do everything possible to save as many lives as possible. You know, having had the Saigon moment, we need the Dunkirk moment, we need to get everybody out. We need to work with regional allies to provide asylum, at least on a temporary basis, if we can't do this all ourselves.”_

_[**[WATCH] REP. GALLAGHER ON AMERICA’S NEWSROOM WITH BILL HEMMER AND DANA PERINO**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BHjUyS-MsGmrMW29nsAOEOw77N5qw3Mp4s3vJDVeDkrAYVD5DlRe7svQtGYDm7bj62EJpm4yBGN3d5ry-aCCVV24GGQ29Fd1miuZjfONeK_pfHm8sZpsVmpm0O3GD9VX9RZpeWlHxTdfmXOEogegNqrs3ouEJqY1VepEj06ifpXPuq1MkZ9iEAG4TkCR5rzRUgVdycX2OPz1wSwDSVWaRKShkuYbHsCNLitcKB0W25LSpjuShxslV4iN8idG4vZYEbzqnrYWk16BkVaU9X-_z4-fSlRj-Nb1fjVtUbKoZ0U7t48F0SFHLwlerPCNYWfkqZgjS6OZQRR57u6io72Uafe1VlHIUHFvuvs5-DHJb8fZvCB4C1bUxzic3MlDKVjhnHTITpgKQq3frjDULlG5TFFBm-CozhlvxfvArl6LLl77Q%3D%3D)_
|
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BHjUyS-MsGmrMW29nsAOEOw77N5qw3Mp4s3vJDVeDkrAYVD5DlRe7svQtGYDm7bj62EJpm4yBGN3d5ry-aCCVV24GGQ29Fd1miuZjfONeK_pfHm8sZpsVmpm0O3GD9VX9RZpeWlHxTdfmXOEogegNqrs3ouEJqY1VepEj06ifpXPuq1MkZ9iEAG4TkCR5rzRUjzLepYUgbN8XfjJIpIWudMsxjg-NkND5572qIxf_ZMGzVZ9ZFz6OW1CgB3c1E5LRP9I7Yv2s39K0x_Ms91ag7tnfsv2-wC6-7-T4yINZppNOC4yt3H4ShsCvE_Hn2N_G4KpbH7V16eAqa1uC9UUlvZhf4diXR2ZMydm9CI7qgtZw9AMFSvsCveFQmZ8E9ZHIo8seE5VH8utfFIuYmxWRYeRlifQMVAZ_V2-njdwYxFvw%3D%3D)
|
---
**Bottom Line:**_“The fact that the President is going on TV and really throwing our Afghan allies under the bus, spitting on the graves of the over 50,000 Afghans who sacrificed their lives fighting with us is a disgrace. It’s unacceptable. And for the administration to equivocate in any way on the fact that we will do everything possible to get our people out is also unacceptable._**_This is America. We do not leave our people behind._**_We have to get our people out as well as our Afghan allies.”_

_[**[WATCH] REP. GALLAGHER ON FOX NEWS WITH HARRIS FAULKNER**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BGA3aV6xDUdc6qLfrKn89skBhm6L8ocH2ZuYXO8s9TDOSnIGu-V95NN6EgSAFxyPf5afR21rlifDr_at_-8JYyFn2wOS81rrOzt9SxJW3wvKx4gyZYXmZ21onxinA4OPrqIWx5HCc6aWLQZhAfFO1O-qiqPHJ4V6RHmz8dLGXimD3lHU2KugX3osnf9o-IGAT_l-RXg1dsn1G0BuQdGFnxinBFuMR2K0ZErHft3wHvEBqe9aOb5kUb3o1RvDzEfRW-L7MszviP-hY2ZFCrcK5yBfUO4FPw4GLEC9AYN_z13uiKi_kXuog7yWBvWlt-2dUn2WOq5COWVLrKyVOggFxx_sD_6LMnNwDHOzKlcWjT-7Dwmf5L_kQ3-nxaMDZ_fAPP8mxpKz06N4bkHkeWHumgf6pwyXO2Xz7qTHKvgncbtHw%3D%3D)_
|
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BGA3aV6xDUdc6qLfrKn89skBhm6L8ocH2ZuYXO8s9TDOSnIGu-V95NN6EgSAFxyPf5afR21rlifDr_at_-8JYyFn2wOS81rrOzt9SxJW3wvKx4gyZYXmZ21onxinA4OPrqIWx5HCc6aWLQZhAfFO1O-qiqPHJ4V6RHmz8dLGXimD3lHU2KugX3osnf9o-IGAT8MC4FFlZl0rYEUuft_WDULDdVBLEcVptfU9YpvPldozBCDIuLm9cGYoWPepKO-hw1IKc-VD34DFvl4PfY4WSw13zvZHJ4WhVI3aIB-9IRJvKSEqv5V3MvKkaTLZJijJVETGiEdlwVA_9Z2n6yxHJj_y48hPfvu7Mdt6ws0f0o7NBuyHAryf1oQePFruBBK7iN7zzSxF097cZrjFVxtj-TjNDsvDCMieP7iCp6XdClLIQ%3D%3D)
|
---
**Bottom Line:**_“Our Pentagon shouldn’t be broadcasting an arbitrary date for withdrawal. Our message should be we’re going to do what we need to do to get our people out of there and however long it takes and however hard it is, we’re not going to leave anybody behind. And_** _if the Taliban messes with us, we will meet that with devastating consequences_** _. But instead, the Biden administration keeps bungling this withdrawal. I mean, this is an epic foreign policy catastrophe. The President’s speech yesterday was a disgrace._

_[**[LISTEN] REP. GALLAGHER ON WIBA WITH BRIAN SCHIMMING**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2976e5fb970f4d46b9cbfb200e2c7081&_e=wa1JlQa2fXFLA4cpD7Ot3_oUOhrrxIznIDX-_H7F7BHMQxRExrMjSPOOkLo53GQvgKGgl949yDhM9Cf-D66pfLbe0GzCwJ3v11lVucFEYwkQhQJOEWPNWeWNAuTDBhJtAVwEM5E451x1uRFdssGbql6W06RxmEHyJDTCLALj43IO5qABvbrMcIq_yjvUpRFVXNK6MdKt4GrdgRTLA68DKG1JsCmf29xQGh02u2tEQFRJvq3FGcZ3OHuK6XXvo8CLyPdfKVEf-Y5pL74MY4spIOJhDEQEv1Pa0KszjBTgciM9B7XfFL63AG3V61GyJSDECAFVnQ-A9ToViqQKo3tmEU0gp1cNJFrsjyJjI0caFPRT3lMlWWRDAVvET-zPCEo170jw2oZTnP2Ed0xKpzvnPQw9hNy3bp9CoM4KDjZFmVqm-R_gN_5s4V6Zuso6rpuWkkctF7I2qhaf2HZ5TsvenA%3D%3D)_

**Bottom Line:**_“This is not what leadership looks like,_**_this is what a complete dereliction of duty looks like._**_This is what weakness looks like. And the fact is, Biden's inability to own up to what is clearly a massive intelligence failure, a failure of planning, and his attempt to cast blame on anyone but himself just adds to the ongoing disgrace.”_

As our team continues to monitor this rapidly evolving situation, we will keep you updated on how Mike is stepping up to lead and what’s happening in Afghanistan, Washington, and around the globe.

Peter, President Biden’s chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan is among the worst-executed foreign policy decisions in modern American history. While the President, Vice President, and White House Press Secretary have been avoiding the American people in the midst of this crisis, Congressman Gallagher has been stepping up to provide much-needed leadership. In case you missed them, I wanted to share a few of Mike’s statements on the situation and draw your attention to the recent interviews he’s given. [[WATCH] REP. Now we need to do everything possible to save as many lives as possible. You know, having had the Saigon moment, we need the Dunkirk moment, we need to get everybody out. We need to work with regional allies to provide asylum, at least on a temporary basis, if we can't do this all ourselves.” [[WATCH] REP. GALLAGHER ON AMERICA’S NEWSROOM WITH BILL HEMMER AND DANA PERINO]() | | Bottom Line:“The fact that the President is going on TV and really throwing our Afghan allies under the bus, spitting on the graves of the over 50,000 Afghans who sacrificed their lives fighting with us is a disgrace. It’s unacceptable. And for the administration to equivocate in any way on the fact that we will do everything possible to get our people out is also unacceptable.This is America. We do not leave our people behind.We have to get our people out as well as our Afghan allies.” [[WATCH] REP. GALLAGHER ON FOX NEWS WITH HARRIS FAULKNER]() | | Bottom Line:“Our Pentagon shouldn’t be broadcasting an arbitrary date for withdrawal. Our message should be we’re going to do what we need to do to get our people out of there and however long it takes and however hard it is, we’re not going to leave anybody behind. name: Team Hunt
subject: ICYMI: Joe Biden's Foreign Policy Catastrophe Will Haunt Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Make sure you don't miss [Wesley's editorial this morning on FoxNews.com](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=11bfedb16abb48c7880692822ac469cd&_e=PV0zUZUkR7yY977ljooBQ3ylaxspZT2TlMZBhIso_KahGnA_QDy-zaO5IhHLodXrLJJPm_8oLlkXx84LpXF79fWj49MGItgE3KRAtGYI1kRSfv7NASoZDP5Pg18rRn2kBIpC3WqopgVdtkZB_I6KxOGnumFyEn96y0nZdyoJgZ3JP6DSWs1tUDiTJzVgbZxMNbh-0gbswXmzidX5O_PprpSxutlEnchr7AiZ5WPUV4XNxFmyltSHpNtTOc6FuCZcKgIUA7-n54dh4MG1lI4cdS9j8vQXpmrwWLHnjC3a8Pp6Qxz9DYg4FclZ9hAa0mzH9YeQKsDOCKbVS7pKozM_T0QdpOCDUb_DdEHKubDHkOC-aKf9LivnVyWcQ95wI9pg) about the Biden Administration's failure in Afghanistan!

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=11bfedb16abb48c7880692822ac469cd&_e=PV0zUZUkR7yY977ljooBQ3ylaxspZT2TlMZBhIso_KahGnA_QDy-zaO5IhHLodXrLJJPm_8oLlkXx84LpXF79fWj49MGItgE3KRAtGYI1kRSfv7NASoZDP5Pg18rRn2kBIpC3WqopgVdtkZB_I6KxAciGSRqLFGz4gbXzrG8eK9n83xNxLoUS-CXyWTszAe5GM_jFMwVWgaKux5xHOCHaPW697C2u5rrKxMfLvLvJiMYBbgu436HK6h-kR271yi6XyXS9g8L3iUMo3xc7OUzdlVUgA5Dtb6cKsJnhXXWP7wPw8d3TKfSmT0GMylzoFpD8BLM38KYsQyWqH9DHeXiEFZ6alijAXcd9cfqp9fzBG6ZpmB3HXiINFi2z_5HcxbR)
_Former George W. Bush and Obama Defense Secretary Robert Gates once described President Joe Biden’s foreign policy record succinctly, saying "I think he has been wrong on nearly every major foreign policy and national security issue over the past four decades." With a record like that, it’s no surprise the Biden administration created a humanitarian crisis with the ill-advised and irresponsible abandonment of Afghanistan._

_Biden and his administration are a colossal disaster—both domestically and internationally. We know the president has a history—over four decades—of making unsound decisions when it comes to foreign policy and national security issues. Instead of solving humanitarian crises, he creates them... starting with our southern border and now Afghanistan. _

_I have never supported remaining in a war lasting for decades or with inconsistent objectives, but we owed it to the Americans and our allies who spilled blood in this conflict in Afghanistan to have a coherent and well-organized draw down of forces. _

_For nearly two decades, brave American soldiers, including friends and classmates of mine, sacrificed their lives to protect our homeland from potential terrorist attack. What we see happening today is a travesty. It is a slap in the face to the many in our armed forces who fought to win the global war on terror and make both America and the world a safer place to the Afghans who risked their lives to help our forces overseas._

_Our provocation to enter Afghanistan was clear as the twin towers fell on September 11, 2001, killing almost 3,000 Americans. In response to this attack, we went into Afghanistan because the Taliban leadership allowed the safe harbor of Usama Bin Laden and Al Qaeda, the masterminds responsible for the horrific terrorist attacks on 9/11. A stable Afghanistan is good for the greater peace and security of the region and for our homeland. _

_On 9/11, my West Point classmates and I watched as the United States faced her greatest threat since Pearl Harbor. We knew this mission could cost us our lives, but committed without hesitation because we believed in protecting this country._

_After years of working to stabilize the region, and in so protect the United States from further attacks, President Biden’s leadership has led to the Taliban reclaiming Afghanistan in a week._

_As I write this, the Taliban is going door-to-door—hunting down U.S. allies, capturing women for sex slaves, beheading translators in the streets and trapping hundreds of U.S. citizens and passport holders behind Taliban checkpoints._

_This attack against freedom-loving people is devastating and is a direct result of the Biden administration’s failure. Perhaps worst of all, radical Islamic terrorists have a new haven from which to launch attacks against America and our allies.

Joe Biden has rejected sound military advice, and the United States and the world is less safe because of it.

The president has an obligation to Americans and our allies to protect our homeland and the citizens of Afghanistan who have served at our side for 20 years—striving to win over the hearts and minds of the Afghan people.

He has failed us at the highest level. Already, an ill-planned withdrawal is leading to human rights violations and an inevitable refugee crisis that will once again impact the world.

The Biden administration had months to plan and implement a strategy that would bring U.S. personnel, our military and allies home safely. This administration is so out of touch and disjointed that the result has been chaos with the region collapsing and Americans still on the ground.

Today, we face the horrific uncertainty that every American and our allies may not make it out of Afghanistan safely. If one American is harmed because of the failures of the president and this administration, Congress must hold them accountable._

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=11bfedb16abb48c7880692822ac469cd&_e=PV0zUZUkR7yY977ljooBQ56Ox1qE7yNt1XLhnoSs_MjEsubL4O2nlXXzMYNV_LNSq-WJTRNGDKfYFpCIu-ebZWmcWNS9nmdA4zMTnjwO30Y1I1FdZbvpjUbZUKd_hFB4XNkGigd_3rhZbNx62BMHedOpG_ibH-iPNIRz8B0wVOCiSTnWbeyhOGXARIo_Ok1rJ_SOVaO6HVBkOVXB6NR_AXIKW9_-1OEJbGG7_yIGMKxB98KYIv_6A-fKlLc21Vd11c2kxi3o64T3h2WgN9yqIcoATNWtp12PZjxvBklZHkk%3D)****
---

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: Biden's a national disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
The tragedy unfolding in Afghanistan is a national embarrassment. It’s a senseless and disastrous end to a senseless war that should have ended the mi | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fdd9c7e82a6409eb935cc14ca92d107&_e=Nc_wr5hJXlh34Ej3Q6wXGyo8qg0g2VXeoTl4iG-678SBbG3_gn0kD4g0kAlJhGZu--29m85yfyI0v2WZJguVaace3m_FC8CDlMXWevDGcRyzB-OqR9l_wruGYbnYp9d1u7El-r2HdA2t2vchLg4Hxw9ebFVXqtewywOvZY5lT-lrbf5UzHx1dgCyr0HulwNLVLll20rTjQVb1-OpnUmN0OuD7EiBw7-ncB-qJHRGsK_ZxnViWuUC5B4nKldE4plI1ysPHNpeB2iVZ8JrS84ck_61q4xqCRtyEawnz52_zoUaAimZI_vrnIfkKPLJBMbAWjznBIYXd6hnnWvoBzz7t43aqSMHetSh0qiSmCMky9hgS3UM1nhDa3uwSiELcjcx9xcwxE1E_6hgZ-x1067n4eEGSit4VMrYDZy_LbbtqZJaP-keAadR_QvQeLpd0BnK8FqkREV-uUWw0RNptNrqVA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow conservative,

The tragedy unfolding in Afghanistan is a national embarrassment. It’s a disastrous end to a senseless war that should have ended a long time ago when the original mission was finished.

The chaos created by the Biden administration in the evacuation is a slap in the face to me and every Veteran who fought in Afghanistan. Knowing that Taliban Mullahs are driving through Kabul in the same Humvees my platoon drove in when I was wounded fills me with profound grief.

We need leaders in Washington who will stand up to senseless wars that have left thousands of American Veterans like me permanently scarred with very little to show for it.

[**That’s why I’m asking for your support so I can hold this administration accountable and stop future administrations from launching more futile wars.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fdd9c7e82a6409eb935cc14ca92d107&_e=Nc_wr5hJXlh34Ej3Q6wXGyo8qg0g2VXeoTl4iG-678SBbG3_gn0kD4g0kAlJhGZu--29m85yfyI0v2WZJguVaace3m_FC8CDlMXWevDGcRyzB-OqR9l_wruGYbnYp9d1u7El-r2HdA2t2vchLg4Hxw9ebFVXqtewywOvZY5lT-lrbf5UzHx1dgCyr0HulwNLVLll20rTjQVb1-OpnUmN0OuD7EiBw7-ncB-qJHRGsK_ZxnViWuUC5B4nKldE4plIgnzBexRnKphMhK0xPEBH9-jZAtZKrqdoXrNNknxJMNk_dmV-Lae_NQWeG841ccR94KU35_g8vJHdxSR_Az_fMVuQzcGnKDfy6pcnB3kzxJIf143LQDpAUBXmlr2FwV3pbtEYRevjRxOVGIFxlQzApjMhw6BXY6pNgbgXqjxY4kjjD341VHWPvRN128x8fGf0w90jr9cs4HvqNNkqGJCUCA%3D%3D)

| [Hold Biden Accountable](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fdd9c7e82a6409eb935cc14ca92d107&_e=Nc_wr5hJXlh34Ej3Q6wXGyo8qg0g2VXeoTl4iG-678SBbG3_gn0kD4g0kAlJhGZu--29m85yfyI0v2WZJguVaace3m_FC8CDlMXWevDGcRyzB-OqR9l_wruGYbnYp9d1u7El-r2HdA2t2vchLg4Hxw9ebFVXqtewywOvZY5lT-lrbf5UzHx1dgCyr0HulwNLVLll20rTjQVb1-OpnUmN0OuD7EiBw7-ncB-qJHRGsK_ZxnViWuUC5B4nKldE4plIDI3dIiqRfcJVdzWfHiZ4Q-3TSnrngDRZgI-dXWkbgB1SrGTD6nN1gx7hsl32ynkx29-JKSUvh42SgWFkZnCl72PayxlMBmo2Gwj2x3RJAXERgz6jg3IEq49rkxoaFMCSZObjR5ZMitg7KN28Ji4jTo_72VcHTohfiNxX4oumwkPTGzPQ6F75FIeKe0_rPt250jfXWRgKDuz_el9_z8aeTw%3D%3D)
---

I personally led Soldiers into battle in Afghanistan. **We didn’t fight for our Commander-in-Chief to be vacationing at Camp David while the Country we fought and died for descends into anarchy.** The Biden administration has failed our military personnel, and they’ve failed our country.

Every American and every Veteran deserves answers for this administration’s colossal failure of leadership. It’s a disastrous end to a senseless war that should have ended a long time ago when the original mission was finished. subject: Do you feel safe?

body:
Does the recent crime surge have you concerned for your family’s safety?... | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=78a82817f0f24099a171a5035a99790f&_e=JW4fO5hopnmaKbXm9joRlSmDMBW4mf3_LchtOwMo8lSlJhHNxRkpPfdTs6Cgb353qttzDJQ-8jC--BRskcFfuAhA_FTbQ7C1Wfa-IcchTv4Omx4BFZYHjEGN6CyBqju6NliOtlNKrcLFSPU9lkNqwOaW3uqa0ORFgTKOvaBPH2lyjMiH8tvVDqcV0_8-SgNdjy6uRPHfFWIyklC0jfbxfk5zYGmigV-gm5Omlag2GpeKqEjVzZ1L7SZPSTrhSWoOCyD6JLPYfp_eKnsmps-37TEohUMduDyJltTH4o8yuM0fVG7x3B8fYYyE88mVlysZPddwDQG7sUNpunAcDsQbGwI_o6BCxjyVGr4yMMJToL007ECYY4dF3br7nGSIj4fCJFutD6qy6zUz5ctyzW9hnaQmpeFyTsUtpAWNmsyYUrDtaN4roDj_68rgFOG4OJaZCM8Vf6NEQpSiL9EcOq7h_H3goK-VNAIMdW2BaErjiyiPmIBPJDM_KLSPr_EejH0S)

Peter,

Since the start of the pandemic, crime has skyrocketed here in Georgia.

**And it’s not just bad in Atlanta - crime is on the rise across the state. It’s happening in our own backyards!**

I wanted to check in with you today to see how you’re feeling about the crime surge, Peter.
[**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=78a82817f0f24099a171a5035a99790f&_e=JW4fO5hopnmaKbXm9joRlSmDMBW4mf3_LchtOwMo8lSlJhHNxRkpPfdTs6Cgb353qttzDJQ-8jC--BRskcFfuAhA_FTbQ7C1Wfa-IcchTv4Omx4BFZYHjEGN6CyBqju6NliOtlNKrcLFSPU9lkNqwOaW3uqa0ORFgTKOvaBPH2lyjMiH8tvVDqcV0_8-SgNdjy6uRPHfFWIyklC0jfbxfk5zYGmigV-gm5Omlag2GpeKqEjVzZ1L7SZPSTrhSWoOCyD6JLPYfp_eKnsmps-37XHzKe6rVcLYd69FSdtmzmyU4QixI_LtGmKPZKyR8VVL8CWRJfTMa_MvgVbnEbAzJHHWdIbGkN2fgfhy7J2Ll74bIUTXLtZRnN9XqT_BEUkiYygzjRgAWz0sYt6Ahn28-Shmy-2F_2F9WtGRUu33SZMse4_un7lXecd3bDmA-hbSjeD7IaB7jLJQCjwWJetgm2jP7PaWlwNRBKyJqKa6yBM4FiV9okqI2mB1Qx7Rf3WH)
As a father, nothing matters more than the safety of my wife and kids. That’s why I’m concerned about the big uptick in crime across Georgia.
** **
**I want to know if you feel the same, Peter.**
[**TELL HAROLD HOW YOU FEEL**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=78a82817f0f24099a171a5035a99790f&_e=JW4fO5hopnmaKbXm9joRlSmDMBW4mf3_LchtOwMo8lSlJhHNxRkpPfdTs6Cgb353qttzDJQ-8jC--BRskcFfuAhA_FTbQ7C1Wfa-IcchTv4Omx4BFZYHjEGN6CyBqju6NliOtlNKrcLFSPU9lkNqwOaW3uqa0ORFgTKOvaBPH2lyjMiH8tvVDqcV0_8-SgNdjy6uRPHfFWIyklC0jfbxfk5zYGmigV-gm5Omlag2GpeKqEjVzZ1L7SZPSTrhSWoOCyD6JLPYfp_eKnsmps-37co3RPgXSPJJdU9mLNvgQrHtxkxDrz89nxQkXIxwuHJc0u3lPIY2wokPsVk68FgKBrGMKg-mYtJlVBhqSLJHpdhvI6Z7xpvQzWWXtGGPxl6dUHvHKG8BkwNcrY1PA0RtoJ-iU2_7qFFE62ZnapOYpMvnZrn3NWcqONDrhPnSdMdGRD-29ua18Ao9Eil1s5Vc7YOGGfAaosFK5hAsjfo1lQ-XSKP-rrZ7ZhJmOLJoWuPE)
_[**Click here to weigh in and let me know how you feel about Georgia’s crime surge. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=78a82817f0f24099a171a5035a99790f&_e=JW4fO5hopnmaKbXm9joRlSmDMBW4mf3_LchtOwMo8lSlJhHNxRkpPfdTs6Cgb353qttzDJQ-8jC--BRskcFfuAhA_FTbQ7C1Wfa-IcchTv4Omx4BFZYHjEGN6CyBqju6NliOtlNKrcLFSPU9lkNqwOaW3uqa0ORFgTKOvaBPH2lyjMiH8tvVDqcV0_8-SgNdjy6uRPHfFWIyklC0jfbxfk5zYGmigV-gm5Omlag2GpeKqEjVzZ1L7SZPSTrhSWoOCyD6JLPYfp_eKnsmps-37fdhSjvaLw2gUNCmspV6cZ37UjSLmvt-yKAVXzw_QFxIAhwucvBHZM7yrVJj4hCIbYcVOgQUCuaw7f87VyknYNUfBbOeG9TR4wOMNddfIyP739yf3wjxRuhAd8wjdttCX07EAgb3-r4rzt18v6e9xGoEzVLBOl4NkyFBTh0DeP93Cehlpn05cci1AJAgi92SLl78-s8KfaxEuRF6UsmnG8ZdZIPEKRRngER5WBlQjYES)_

__In freedom,
Harold

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Something Gabby likes to remind me of...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — I wanted to send off this note before I forgot.
I wanted you to hear directly from me how appreciative I am for your ongoing support. I know we say it a lot, but this is truly a people-powered campaign.
We won this race last year because we stuck together and fought as a team to run one of the biggest campaigns Arizona has ever seen. And we are going to need that same energy to hold this seat again in 2022.
And as I’m sure you know, this campaign runs on folks like you chipping in $5 or $10 when you can. Which is why today I have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 contribution to this people-powered campaign? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210819-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1168_6688874_wE-SBV&akid=1168%2E6688874%2EwE-SBV)

name: Team Scheller
subject: Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller's statement on Susan Wild's Fox News appearance defending the actions of President Joe Biden.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc
body:
PA-07 Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller released a statement on Susan
Wild's Fox News appearance defending the actions of President Joe Biden on h

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

August 19, 2021

Contact: Pierce Frauenheim

Pierce@schellerforcongress.com

PA-07 Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller released a statement on Susan
Wild's Fox News appearance defending the actions of President Joe Biden on his
botched execution during America's withdrawal from Afghanistan.

Allentown, PA- "It shows an absolute lack of leadership by Susan Wild to give
the Biden administration a pass on the botched execution of our withdrawal in
Afghanistan." Said candidate Scheller.

Wild said in a Fox News interview that "we had not heard that much from
President Biden and I don't fault him for that" when asked if Joe Biden should
answer questions on the crisis in Afghanistan.

"Yesterday, Joe Biden came out and gave a press conference on a COVID booster
shot and then refused to answer any questions regarding the stunning collapse
of the Afghan government and Susan Wild thinks that we should not fault him,
for refusing to answer questions directly relating to crisis in Afghanistan. We
need real leadership, someone who is willing to step up and demand answers and
not defend the abhorrent lack of communication from our Commander in Chief.
Susan Wild cares more about toeing the party line, giving talking points, and
refusing to take a tough stance against Joe Biden rather than standing up for
the people of PA-07 and demanding accountability. The situation in Afghanistan
is grave and my heart breaks for the men and especially the women in
Afghanistan who face a dark future under Taliban rule.

It is time Susan Wild demands answers for either this massive intelligence
failure from his administration, or worse, the lack of caring on the outcome in
Afghanistan from Joe Biden. Time to do your damn job, Congresswoman."

###

Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc.
Unsubscribe
<http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=30f886dcfd094748831b00c4c944082b&_t=5qb37o8vhJrBGTfUxu80ZflU08WcnllLS2rzsDy77MWqORkuhtzw2z6YJ8JY_9HT3GLySgU41lHv8DNLipDccsAylAQccUkds8OAzHurnsfGkc_w971EvaxgDmA89WFNCq8gIfhlqNV04k0yZXK4p-yhRScjtqZsssrsdK4fu7o%3D>

Susan Wild cares more about toeing the party line, giving talking points, and refusing to take a tough stance against Joe Biden rather than standing up for the people of PA-07 and demanding accountability. The situation in Afghanistan is grave and my heart breaks for the men and especially the women in Afghanistan who face a dark future under Taliban rule. It is time Susan Wild demands answers for either this massive intelligence failure from his administration, or worse, the lack of caring on the outcome in Afghanistan from Joe Biden. Time to do your damn job, Congresswoman." Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc.

name: Erica Smith
subject: Thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug prices, passing the For the People Act, raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour, passing the Green New Deal, abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster, legalizing marijuana nationally, passing the Equality Act, defending reproductive rights enshrined under Roe v. Wade, and a lot more.
#
**It’s never been more important to elect a progressive Democrat like me to the U.S. Senate in 2022.** After all, I could be the deciding YES vote on a lot of important legislation.
We have a razor-thin majority. And we can’t count on Senator Manchin and Senator Sinema when it comes to abolishing the filibuster, guaranteeing voting rights for Black people, or even raising the minimum wage. That seems clear.
But you COULD count on Senator Smith from North Carolina to be the deciding YES vote on all of that. _In fact..._
**Here’s what I could be the deciding YES vote on if elected to the U.S. Senate in 2022:**
* Expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug prices
* Passing the For the People Act
* Raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour
* Abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster
* Passing bold climate legislation like the Green New Deal
* Legalizing marijuana nationally
* Passing the Equality Act
* Defending reproductive rights enshrined under Roe v. Wade

[**The buck could stop with me and my vote as a progressive Democratic senator from North Carolina. So will you help me today by making a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate? The majority of our campaign funding comes from small dollar donations online.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/11333?refcode=em20210819-362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=362%2E3698%2EIdfe6b)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/11333?refcode=em20210819-362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=362%2E3698%2EIdfe6b)

---

subject: Proud Boys supporter on Warnock: “Dead men can’t pass laws”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Yesterday, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media \-- writing, “Dead men can't pass laws.” This is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party \-- and it proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. Right-wing extremists like Edward Florea are threatening Raphael Warnock personally. And CNN reports that Trump ally Kelly Loeffler \-- who lost her Georgia Senate seat on January 5 by less than 100,000 votes \-- is seriously considering challenging Warnock in 2022. Peter, CNN just declared Warnock the #1 most vulnerable Democrat in the country in 2022. And if Warnock loses his Senate seat, Democrats will hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell. That means: Goodbye, voting rights reform. Goodbye, universal health care. Goodbye, expansions to Medicare and Social Security. We are doing all we can to re-elect Raphael Warnock and protect our razor-thin 50/50 Senate majority. But yesterday, we FAILED to reach our fundraising goal. YOU stepped up in a big way to elect Raphael Warnock and give Democrats a 50/50 Senate. It's only because of you that Democrats have been able to pass COVID-19 relief and get more money into the hands of Americans. But with GOP extremists becoming more empowered by feckless GOP members of Congress like Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, there hasn't been a more important moment for you to give again to protect Raphael Warnock and our Senate majority. **[We MUST raise $3,000 before midnight tonight to protect Raphael Warnock's Senate seat and keep our Democratic Senate. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Remembering my mom, Kelly Kenyatta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This campaign is for people like her
#

Friend,
People ask why I want to be in the U.S. Senate, and the reasons are numerous. But a simple answer is for people like my mom.
Today should have been her 62nd birthday, but instead, we’re still mourning her loss.
I often think of the cruel irony that my mom — who was trained as a CNA and spent most of her career as a home health aide helping others get their medication on time — would come to ration her insulin.
I think of her commitment to service even as we struggled. As a kid I’d be infuriated that my mom would make us volunteer, even when our housing and food was insecure.
She’d say: _“Nobody can do everything, but everybody can do something. You always have more than someone else.”_
I reflect on her taking out payday loans and borrowing from loan sharks to provide for my siblings and me — knowing it would push her further into debt but never wanting us to spend a day on the street.
I remember her tough love and soft embrace, pushing me to go big — never allowing humble beginnings as an excuse for me or those around her to not succeed.
I think of her pushing me to get involved. As an 11-year-old, I complained about trash and blight on the block we were living on, and she snapped back, _“if you care so much, go do something about it.”_
I ran for junior block captain, and my own commitment to service was born.
I’m still proud of her for going back to school and getting her associate degree from Harcum College after learning disabilities and shame kept her from completing her B.A. at Delaware State.
And every day, I’m grateful for all she poured into me and taught me. Every day I wish she was here to give an encouraging word or recite the perfect bible verse for inspiration and wisdom.
I miss her every day.
But I also know there are so many other Kelly Kenyattas out there — working hard, but never enough to get ahead.
Hard working people who deserve so much more than they ever got.
This campaign is about them.
Thanks for reading and being a part of our movement,
Malcolm
Malcolm Kenyatta is running to represent working people from Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.
[This campaign is powered by everyday people giving a few bucks at a time. Could you chip in $3 to fuel our movement and elect a working-class champion to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34332594/301646857/-353695395?refcode2=6b457885-2f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210819-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ1Nzg4NS0yZjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BfszC59fTV3kYeMxPdncCVimSYScPpjzJrbCOr9W9a0=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34332595/301646858/-353695395?refcode2=6b457885-2f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210819-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ1Nzg4NS0yZjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BfszC59fTV3kYeMxPdncCVimSYScPpjzJrbCOr9W9a0=)**

subject: Eric Hall is so close to winning in Birmingham! We need your help!
body:
Eric is running with a great slate of candidates in Birmingham, Alabama. To win we need to raise an additional $3,000 by Monday! Can you chip in $27?🔥 | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c060924cf7&e=66979298f9)

| | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9793fa7d74&e=66979298f9)
---
| My name is Eric Hall. I'm running to be District 9's next representative on City Council here in Birmingham, Alabama.

I've got less than a week to make something big happen. And I need your help.

For years, leaders at Birmingham City Hall have taken millions of tax dollars from my city's working families and given it to corporate executives and real estate developers, oftentimes in my city's most gentrified neighborhoods.

These corporate giveaways have been devastating for my neighbors here in District 9.

I've met neighbors on the campaign trail who've been calling City Hall for years to do simple thingslike fill potholes, cut grass, and pick up trash on abandoned lots, only to have their calls unanswered time and time again.

Food deserts force my neighbors to spend their grocery budget at corporate superstores like Walmart in cities that are many miles away.

All the while, Birmingham's heavy industries continue to pollute neighborhoods in my district that the EPA says have high levels of lead and arsenic.

But YOU can help me change all of that.

---
|
---
| [DONATE $27](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=98e38cd850&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $27")
---
|
---
| YOU can help me win on Election Day -- that's this Tuesday, August 24 -- so my neighbors will have a fighter for THEM in City Hall.

YOU can help me bring green industries to Birmingham that will not only keep our land and water clean, but bring jobs that will give my neighbors power and dignity at the workplace.

YOU can help me bring a cooperative-owned grocery store to District 9 so my neighbors can have fresh, affordable food close to where they live.

In June, India Walton, an open socialist, stunned the nation by defeating a four-term incumbent and winning the Buffalo mayoral Democratic Primary. She did this in part by sending hundreds of her supporters to Buffalo's precincts on Election Day to engage voters and **flip them at the polls.**

I need to raise $3,000 by Monday, August 23 to send my supporters out to Birmingham’s precincts on Election Day. [Can you donate **$27** to help me fund my Election Day GOTV efforts so we can flip voters at the polls and put a fighter for the working people of Birmingham in City Hall?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b893f6bb4f&e=66979298f9)
---
| [DONATE $27](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=bf7ddcec9a&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $27")
---

---

---

Eric Hall
_For Birmingham City Council District 9_

But YOU can help me change all of that. | | "DONATE $27" | | YOU can help me win on Election Day -- that's this Tuesday, August 24 -- so my neighbors will have a fighter for THEM in City Hall. YOU can help me bring green industries to Birmingham that will not only keep our land and water clean, but bring jobs that will give my neighbors power and dignity at the workplace. YOU can help me bring a cooperative-owned grocery store to District 9 so my neighbors can have fresh, affordable food close to where they live. In June, India Walton, an open socialist, stunned the nation by defeating a four-term incumbent and winning the Buffalo mayoral Democratic Primary. She did this in part by sending hundreds of her supporters to Buffalo's precincts on Election Day to engage voters and flip them at the polls. I need to raise $3,000 by Monday, August 23 to send my supporters out to Birmingham’s precincts on Election Day. | "DONATE $27" | "VOLUNTEER" | | | In solidarity and gratitude, Eric Hall For Birmingham City Council District 9 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved.

body:
The events unfolding in Afghanistan have been difficult to watch. After two decades of war, Afghans are now facing a humanitarian and refugee crisis as the Taliban has retaken control of the country. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34332774/301647458/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkOWJhZDY0LTMwMDEtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=REQhd-iZr66BFGzBgtmJwYt-QLDulxZNZZWEtIdwuHA=&emci=a06ff352-1601-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5d9bad64-3001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) Team,

The events unfolding in Afghanistan have been difficult to watch. After two decades of war, Afghans are now facing a humanitarian and refugee crisis as the Taliban has retaken control of the country.

We're not here to debate foreign policy or how we got to this position -- our focus is on ensuring that Afghan refugees receive the help they deserve.

In the coming weeks, Afghan refugees will enter our country, many of whom risked their lives to assist our troops. We have an obligation to welcome them with open arms. But some Republicans have already made it clear that they're turning their backs on these people when they need us the most.

Last month, sixteen Republicans in Congress voted against a bill that makes it easier for Afghans who assisted the American military to relocate to our country. Trump advisor Stephen Miller urged Republicans to reject efforts to expand Special Immigrant Visas, and Fox News host Tucker Carlson accused politicians of allowing the country to be "invaded" by refugees.

In their time of crisis, we need to be there for the people of Afghanistan -- not stoking fear and hatred. We must keep the pressure on lawmakers to ensure they're doing everything in their power to help Afghan refugees and provide support as they rebuild their lives.

**[If you agree, add your name to call on Congress to ensure they're working to assist as many Afghan refugees as possible.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34332775/301647459/188030776?gpsid=8_139_20185&ms=em21_210819_afghan_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&refcode=em21_210819_afghan_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210819_afghan_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkOWJhZDY0LTMwMDEtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=REQhd-iZr66BFGzBgtmJwYt-QLDulxZNZZWEtIdwuHA=&emci=a06ff352-1601-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5d9bad64-3001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001)**

Thank you,

Never Again PAC

Peter,

**Let's take a second to talk about Christy.**

While you may know Christy as a candidate for California's 25th district, her dedication to her community didn't start here. _It goes back decades._ [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34332872/301648298/603413537?refcode=em21_210819_christybio_S1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg1ZTE3NS0zMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HxQpDwCtsjyyM__E8eoxXQjRcFDbS-9azAUux4YZ8aE=) Christy didn't move to this district to run for office, she was born and raised in this district. Before attending UCLA, she attended community college and gained a passion for affordable, quality education.

In 1994, Christy started her career at the Department of Education -- she immediately recognized that she could be directing more funding to schools by eliminating tax-payer dollars that were going to waste.

**But she didn't stop there.**

In 2009, she was elected to the school board -- ensuring the students in her school district received the best possible education they could.

**She wasn't done yet.**

Christy ran for California's State Legislature where she built a reputation -- always delivering for her district. From securing millions of dollars in funding for local colleges that went to students in need to giving families the time they need when they need it by passing family leave legislation, Christy got it done for her constituents.

**This is the person we need in office -- a person dedicated to her community. Someone who has raised their family in this district, with a track record of working hard for the people she represents.**

**[We know Christy will get things done when she's in Congress but she can't get there without your help. Thank you so much for always having her back! Now let's take a page from Christy's book and go get this done.

\--Team Christy [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34332874/301648300/603413537?refcode=em21_210819_christybio_S1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg1ZTE3NS0zMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HxQpDwCtsjyyM__E8eoxXQjRcFDbS-9azAUux4YZ8aE=)

name: Chris Palombi
subject: Police officers don’t deserve this hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palombi for Congress Contributions to Palombi for Congress are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes
body:
Leftist billionaire George Soros just gave a massive donation to the radical anti-police group, Color of Change PAC. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c382%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=06evHxfo8p44jI1Jksw6eA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65079%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=URPjAqiM9VJIOtJ2awgkBg&sysid=1)
Patriot,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65070%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pkXs1ga3F7mE%2bL8A1TGp9g&sysid=1) Leftist billionaire George Soros just gave a massive donation to the radical anti-police group, Color of Change PAC.

Their sister group, Color of Change, wants to defund police departments across the country.

You and I know that’s crazy and extremely dangerous.

You see, I’m a five-year veteran of the U.S. Capitol Police.

My name is Chris Palombi. I’m running for Congress in Maryland’s fifth district.

[**And I am asking for your help so I can get to Washington and stop this madness.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65071%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Veh4N0GM58NSYwffWfb7Jg&sysid=1)

[**Can I count on you to give a critically important $12 right now to help reach 400 voters?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65072%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FdGxpVcKjLTJLQaWysKGEw&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65073%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CFevr%2f9IEvWnsFqj4VFY5w&sysid=1)
I’m proud I got to protect and serve the Representatives, Senators, their staffers, and voters who came to Capitol Hill between 2007 and 2012.

And what I’m about to tell you makes my blood boil!

A member of the Color of Change staff said that, “**Capitol Police are actually members of a massive hate group** - the Fraternal Order of Police.”

And now radical, anti-law and order groups and their elected Democrat allies **are pulling out all the stops to defund police, hamstring police, and turn our cities over to mobs who burn, loot, and murder**.

My opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s righthand man, mega-liberal Steny Hoyer, is part of the problem.

You see, he co-sponsored the disastrous Justice In Policing Act that will hamstring police officers and put you, me, our families, our friends, and our fellow Americans in even greater danger than before.

In fact, just two months ago, Hoyer took to the floor of the House during National Police Week.

He said he appreciated police officers...but then closed with his sale pitch for the Justice in Policing Act, **that will get more police officers and everyday Americans killed!**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65073%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CFevr%2f9IEvWnsFqj4VFY5w&sysid=1)
As you can see, Steny Hoyer needs to lose on Election Day.

**And I can beat him.**

Right now, I’m filming powerful videos to reach and persuade voters.

And I’ve launched a comprehensive grassroots outreach effort. Block walking, door knocking, phone calling, talking to voters, persuading them, and getting them to turn out on Election Day.

But as you can imagine, funding all of this is going to be expensive.

[**Patriot, that’s why I ask you to give your very best gift of a critical $12 or more immediately.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65074%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M%2fdiEcxfYAMBjyJn300Y5Q&sysid=1)

For every $12 you give, I will be able to reach 400 voters. For $24 I will be able to reach 800 voters and so on.

I can’t do it without you.

But with your vital help, I can beat Steny Hoyer.

[**Your crucially important gift of $12 or whatever you can afford now will help fully fund my voter outreach program here in Maryland.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65085%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rg5klgtQ7MJdp2UaGQZWKg&sysid=1)

And you can send a patriotic police veteran to Capitol Hill.

Please give right away. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Chris Palombi
Republican Candidate for Congress, Maryland District 5
U.S. Capitol Police veteran, 2007-2012

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65073%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CFevr%2f9IEvWnsFqj4VFY5w&sysid=1)

name: Tony =?iso-8859-1?q?C=E1rdenas?=
subject: re: Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
No one should be forced to choose between paying for health care or food on the table.

| Peter,

I believe Americans deserve health care -- _regardless of economic status._

That’s why I stepped up as an original Co-Sponsor of the House Medicare for All bill -- _and it’s why I need your help now._

And in the midst of a severe pandemic and the rapidly spreading Delta variant, this has **never** been more urgent.

**[I need a surge of support to stand with me in support of Medicare for All. name: Susan Wild
subject: What do you love about PA?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I knew this was where I wanted to stay and raise a family.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34334446/301653393/1383103142?refcode=blu-swc-20210819-1-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRiNDQzYS0zNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bO1jpYhQqWObsGrqtIDGOoBaBQgQUlZTCxQrTBRF4s=)
---
| Peter,

**PA-07 is more than just a congressional district to me. It is my home.**

Growing up in a military family, I never lived in one place for very long. When I moved to the Lehigh Valley more than 30 years ago, I fell in love with the community, and I knew this was where I wanted to stay and raise a family.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34334447/301653394/-2069787612?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRiNDQzYS0zNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bO1jpYhQqWObsGrqtIDGOoBaBQgQUlZTCxQrTBRF4s=&emci=fcf4bedc-2601-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=654b443a-3501-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5543981)
My two children were born here and attended our public schools. I built my career here and became actively engaged in the community. So when I saw Washington politicians ignoring our voices, I knew I had to take a stand by running for Congress — and now I am so honored to work every day for Pennsylvania families. I think of my constituents as my extended family, and I care deeply about their struggles, their successes, and their future.

I hope that this summer you have been able to enjoy some of the wonderful offerings that Pennsylvania has to offer, whether that’s by going to one of our many beautiful state parks, seeing the Lehigh Valley IronPigs play, or enjoying our many local farmers' markets.

As we approach the end of the summer, will you take a moment to share with me your favorite Pennsylvania activities?
| [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34334448/301653395/142062240?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRiNDQzYS0zNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bO1jpYhQqWObsGrqtIDGOoBaBQgQUlZTCxQrTBRF4s=&emci=fcf4bedc-2601-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=654b443a-3501-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5543981)

Best,
Susan

subject: The threat of climate change

body:
I’m ready to take on this challenge.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34334918/301654943/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDcxMGNiZi0zNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a3QBCEksjRES05GfRHKLDw4HKdUKph-0F-5_bEaMCF8=)
---
I’ve said it before and will say it again: Protecting Virginians is my top priority.

**That’s why combating climate change is so important to me, Peter.**

It’s more clear than ever before that climate change is here, and it’s posing a real threat to our way of life in Virginia.

Not only does this affect Virginia’s diverse natural environment, public health, and national security ‐‐ _but disproportionately impacts our Black and Brown communities._

Climate justice doesn’t exist without racial justice. As Lt. Governor, and as a woman of color, I’m ready to take this challenge head‐on.

In the House of Delegates, I worked on landmark environmental legislation to protect our coasts, expand solar and wind access, eliminate harmful carbon emissions, and bring clean energy jobs to our state.

**And Peter, my extreme Republican opponent Winsome Sears has no plan to stop climate change. So I’m dedicated to seeing this through as Lt. Governor ‐‐ but I need your support!**

[**Can I count on you to chip in $3 to help elect me as Lt. Governor? With a mere few months left until Election Day, every dollar helps us reach critical voters, travel to one more city, and win this race. My team tells me our fundraising has dipped a bit and we need to raise $5,000 to get back on track.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34334921/301654945/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210819_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDcxMGNiZi0zNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a3QBCEksjRES05GfRHKLDw4HKdUKph-0F-5_bEaMCF8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34334931/301654956/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=HAFV_20210819_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDcxMGNiZi0zNjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a3QBCEksjRES05GfRHKLDw4HKdUKph-0F-5_bEaMCF8=)

clean_body: I’m ready to take on this challenge. | = I’ve said it before and will say it again: Protecting Virginians is my top priority. That’s why combating climate change is so important to me, Peter. It’s more clear than ever before that climate change is here, and it’s posing a real threat to our way of life in Virginia. Not only does this affect Virginia’s diverse natural environment, public health, and national security ‐‐ but disproportionately impacts our Black and Brown communities. Climate justice doesn’t exist without racial justice. As Lt. Governor, and as a woman of color, I’m ready to take this challenge head‐on. In the House of Delegates, I worked on landmark environmental legislation to protect our coasts, expand solar and wind access, eliminate harmful carbon emissions, and bring clean energy jobs to our state. And Peter, my extreme Republican opponent Winsome Sears has no plan to stop climate change. So I’m dedicated to seeing this through as Lt. Governor ‐‐ but I need your support! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Together, = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Governor | | Paid for by Hala For Virginia P.O. Box 7434, Woodbridge, VA 22195 www.halaforvirginia.com Hala Ayala is the Democratic nominee running for Virginia Lt. Governor. As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we've come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She's running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it'll take to get it done. Please, consider making a =. | | Friend,

The 2020 Census data released last week confirmed that **Ohio will lose a seat in the US House of Representatives next year.**

Ohio’s political clout is weakened by the loss of a seat in Congress. The loss is compounded when _constituents are left out of how district lines will be redrawn._

Right now, our House Majority is _extremely fragile,_ and it could be our district that suffers mightily when this new change takes place. Having a fierce advocate like Marcy Kaptur in Congress is critical. Ohio can’t afford to lose more political clout.

**[Can you chip in $20 to help Marcy keep this seat in Congress so she can continue fighting for family priorities? name: David McIntosh
subject: What do you think about inflation?
body:
Companies that go "woke" and try to cancel conservatives and promote a political agenda should stop expecting special perks like tax breaks from Washington that they should have NEVER had in the first place. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d70ac968de54f13b808ff9514fe73dd&_e=Ub6ofX8iUZlPHWZugc6aEGEirlhctE9gIkOJFp6ASPQOxiizEnfHeTSOI4ojXbzYswp7DW6-rlXOtQtlPM09wh0C3rMj-aAhkqnXd4dURty-Cg7LK9V9jVnW6ZxO4voKJe4HFKE7XJBI1UrbjfUJt5XLcSkM84wjhBIAJ22zyShOUpsWb9qpxl8v4_3ohvDss4z89pfsrDiGe3myrs8vcZyNo5BdcwYn0gShljbTEmeW2yvDeQF9CuUT79lvHdiHHVkqb2beB7RXSNNzdgCVHRlnhC8wbfmah6pkV2hWgC62udKrXJ5Trv8kEU6-H3q4)

Dear Friend,

I have some bad news: **inflation, a.k.a the hidden tax increase on working Americans, is here to stay.**

Wages may be up 4% year-over-year, but you may not have noticed thanks to the rising costs of goods and services across the country.

Just look at these stats:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d70ac968de54f13b808ff9514fe73dd&_e=Ub6ofX8iUZlPHWZugc6aEGEirlhctE9gIkOJFp6ASPQOxiizEnfHeTSOI4ojXbzYswp7DW6-rlXOtQtlPM09wqiB9wriJ9BUgS6HZmPoBiAaKDeKkpK5t8XtUsrHNwx5ph15DlrikciYNSI9zOeas8_UaTR12O_kFS-Gom3pjbBhv8dkUXVwrqXBQp0mqJX513Du7D3diKe_aDwVR5vh4sRFT0IVDUkl15Mh0RZZ-sjgIz3uHsRR2Afe1UokYC9RlDFzAtEM6bdauEoGjlWGCw4PdDhKu-QmOyXXJ7ZG5btjoQg3yxP9Sx9kXQCXrA64)
Despite rising prices, Joe Biden, the Democrats, and some Establishment Republicans continue to support big-spending plans, like the so-called infrastructure bill, that will only make inflation worse.

**Now we want to hear YOUR thoughts: how is inflation affecting you?**

**[TAKE THE THREE QUESTION SURVEY:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d70ac968de54f13b808ff9514fe73dd&_e=Ub6ofX8iUZlPHWZugc6aEGEirlhctE9gIkOJFp6ASPQOxiizEnfHeTSOI4ojXbzYswp7DW6-rlXOtQtlPM09wodvjyVE8eWX0glE4ntQrv7iqve-khR70VzQjPnhOy05KDf8zMcCqZhqBhKMR2By7oUfzIYODO0TMcRAGelu_ZMCFRyHMIxz1Wtk0BoxiPbbKrCrzhwk-qeaUocvXgNIB954jSNyTuZ3C0Y_W5I5IoqknKnZFAPTWUCOfrIDQ-2tLL0him9p3MVtktamBfZHma6GSfUopdsXRlwVAu3AKuttzZhayX3ERZkRmCQFx6tl)**

**1\. Have you noticed you’re paying more for gas, groceries, and other goods and services?**

**[VERY CONCERNED](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d70ac968de54f13b808ff9514fe73dd&_e=Ub6ofX8iUZlPHWZugc6aEGEirlhctE9gIkOJFp6ASPQOxiizEnfHeTSOI4ojXbzYswp7DW6-rlXOtQtlPM09wjFc8ckW4qCQFvGiWCL3RNLipFpsQskx7K_iHm7pr_6pvybDQCE4a5KnRXMVeUJJ7ivOWJsGUYnTxUFj83OxjwPGFZaP5FaqeoWd-JLuquaUcv35fbThuYKhq4lEbp5irF8YSoOThXQPOU3RD6tlqQexlHmFS7tmG1fzpFhGlxXkN7NmvNLy0t_XqmFEWrqrd4X_h97rVe9BQgkvHx4M9WQbkARUkKvf6UDNfXM2eZCl)**

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Please join me on this issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ykIgg4zMAhGg0f6NDBGxV0bVTeaKjhXq6dNhDeaW3Q0=/5CM59GYeHGit_W1qGoQ68GUmseZFrypFR9fVDh6MTNU=)
Many Californians have spent the summer under hazy, smoke-filled skies due to the unprecedented wildfires ravaging our state. Unfortunately, we can no longer debate whether we will see the effects of climate change in our lifetimes; we are experiencing those effects today.
We must do what we can to slow down climate change immediately, and that starts with banning all fracking.
[**_Please click here to sign your name and urge Congress to end fracking now._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ykIgg4zMAhGg0f6NDBGxV0bVTeaKjhXq6dNhDeaW3Q0=/5CM59GYeHGit_W1qGoQ68GUmseZFrypFR9fVDh6MTNU=)
Fracking slows our fight against climate change by delaying the badly-needed transition to cleaner energy sources. It dumps toxic chemicals into our communities' groundwater and has been linked to increased earthquake risk.
Last year, I urged the House Appropriations Committee to include a provision to protect public lands in California from new oil and gas development, including fracking. I then called on the Senate to prevent fracking in California's Central Coast.
But although this is a start, we can't stop fighting until we ban fracking altogether. That's why I'm calling on you to join this fight and add your name by [**_clicking here_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ykIgg4zMAhGg0f6NDBGxV0bVTeaKjhXq6dNhDeaW3Q0=/5CM59GYeHGit_W1qGoQ68GUmseZFrypFR9fVDh6MTNU=).
Climate change is real, it is happening now, and we must all do our part to slow it down. Thank you for taking the time to read this important message and stand with me today. Your actions can make a difference and I appreciate your support.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal
Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Hold Joe Biden accountable for his Afghanistan crisis >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress_**
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58160295:6zCnZOlRN:m:1:3253819041:AE39495C5D1CCF05AB03C9E876B692D8:r)
---
Peter,
---
| **Joe Biden FAILED our nation in Afghanistan** with his disastrous exit and the fall of Kabul. Now, he's working with the **leftist media to HIDE the truth and AVOID responsibility.** **The American people MUST know each of Joe Biden 's failures in Afghanistan.** **[Add your name to demand answers and hold Joe Biden accountable>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58160295:6zCnZOlRN:m:1:3253819041:AE39495C5D1CCF05AB03C9E876B692D8:r "Add your name to
demand answers and hold Joe Biden accountable >>")**
---
[SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58160295:6zCnZOlRN:m:1:3253819041:AE39495C5D1CCF05AB03C9E876B692D8:r)
---
|
* **80,000 Afghan allies** and their families--who put their lives at risk to assist our military--have been stabbed in the back and abandoned.

* **10,000 American citizens** in Kabul are being told that the U.S. Government has **no plan** and will offer **no help** to get them to the airport.

* Billions of dollars of **highly-advanced military equipment** have been left in the hands of brutal terrorists.

* China is _already_ using this massive humiliation to**tear down America 's reputation overseas.**

I will not mince words:**_everything_ that went wrong **is because of **Joe Biden 's failure of leadership.** **Don 't let him get away with it. [Demand accountability for his failures in Afghanistan. Sign your name>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58160295:6zCnZOlRN:m:1:3253819041:AE39495C5D1CCF05AB03C9E876B692D8:r "Demand accountability for his failures in Afghanistan. Sign your name>>")**

| Thanks, Jim

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hi Peter --

Next week, I'll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the coming months. Before we do, it's important to me that I get your feedback.

Growing up, my mom always told me we had two ears and one mouth for a reason -- to do more listening and less talking. Our campaign for U.S. Senate is about setting an agenda together that’s actually tailored to our state because I'm not just talking the talk, I'm walking the walk -- all the way from Superior to Kenosha.

That's why I’ve been out on the road so much, listening to folks from all over our state, having important conversations about what’s going on in their communities, and asking how I can help. It's something our campaign will continue to do.

Look, our state has nearly six million people and only two U.S. Senators. One of them is in the habit of listening to the folks she was elected to represent and standing up for their best interests in Washington. The other one is too busy working for his wealthy campaign donors to do what's right for Wisconsin families. That has to change.

My top priority is to make sure we’re not leaving anybody behind as we build this campaign from the ground up, which is why I send these brief surveys around. I wish I could sit down and grab a cup of coffee (or tea!) with you to hear your thoughts, but the next-best way for me to know what's on your mind is by asking you over email.

**[Peter, will you take a minute or two to fill out my Official August Priorities Survey and let me know what issues matter most to you? Your input will help shape our campaign agenda moving forward. I’d love to hear from you today and get your thoughts on a few ideas we’re thinking through.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34337464/301662786/-161573669?gpsid=50_130_20187&refcode=em21_210819_Survey_engg_gq_45DayAct__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210819_Survey_engg_gq_45DayAct__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg4NDZmNi0zZjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwyCZHcRyZlnuIzuaZ2lYptWHxf3jYbMjVfxODnFYsc=&emci=b28846f6-3f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b58846f6-3f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)**
| [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34337465/301662789/-161573669?gpsid=50_130_20187&refcode=em21_210819_Survey_engg_gq_45DayAct__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210819_Survey_engg_gq_45DayAct__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg4NDZmNi0zZjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwyCZHcRyZlnuIzuaZ2lYptWHxf3jYbMjVfxODnFYsc=&emci=b28846f6-3f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b58846f6-3f01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)
---

We have an incredible opportunity to put this seat back to work for Wisconsin, but that kind of progress will only be accomplished if we work together and listen to one another. The success of our campaign depends on you getting involved and making your voice heard, which is why I need to hear what's on your mind.

I can't wait to read your response. Talk soon.

— Sarah

P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members and let’s see if we can reach a few more people!

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
