clean_body: Hi Peter -- Next week, I'll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the coming months. Before we do, it's important to me that I get your feedback. Growing up, my mom always told me we had two ears and one mouth for a reason -- to do more listening and less talking. Our campaign for U.S. Senate is about setting an agenda together that’s actually tailored to our state because I'm not just talking the talk, I'm walking the walk -- all the way from Superior to Kenosha. That's why I’ve been out on the road so much, listening to folks from all over our state, having important conversations about what’s going on in their communities, and asking how I can help. It's something our campaign will continue to do. Look, our state has nearly six million people and only two U.S. Senators. One of them is in the habit of listening to the folks she was elected to represent and standing up for their best interests in Washington. The other one is too busy working for his wealthy campaign donors to do what's right for Wisconsin families. That has to change. My top priority is to make sure we’re not leaving anybody behind as we build this campaign from the ground up, which is why I send these brief surveys around. I wish I could sit down and grab a cup of coffee (or tea!) with you to hear your thoughts, but the next-best way for me to know what's on your mind is by asking you over email. | We have an incredible opportunity to put this seat back to work for Wisconsin, but that kind of progress will only be accomplished if we work together and listen to one another. The success of our campaign depends on you getting involved and making your voice heard, which is why I need to hear what's on your mind. I can't wait to read your response. Talk soon. — Sarah P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members and let’s see if we can reach a few more people! Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

Folks, Kevin McCarthy has been helping raise money for Mike Pence. Hospitals across CA-23 are running out of beds. The COVID-19 pandemic is far from over and yet, the person who represents us in California’s 23rd Congressional District is nowhere to be found! So where has he been, folks? **He was in Jackson Hole, Wyoming at a donor retreat with Mike Pence.** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoP-Ovx_8B9vfxgumpgZ6SSgWOjSeQCgVIzjExU03SKxnDQtA4m77Hm3Q89eLvo5W1PjJqrG-2CbzKkNvKHC4pZ3wLSRyyXca-h8Z5ltsoR8iotC6_ifdQVyB003ffCb3F_3KaltBuN3Sig4D94PfLTeSVLWBgi9PH7GHUXFuspo2wD5TB7BjmAe4e2JMJv1yL43VPDfoswds6TrXNzVO7jSYsIz6gUTn2Wi_jSJx6vuNSIC2fYoDCC-WQihA1BN-QzqVNGfz9Gq0xrsAzZ3Vrm2sdR8EBALAHYevMSyaELC0/3el/3EImgPm_QeSvO94NKYNsvg/h0/-ipcZVandll8JZJ6PYWVk_HowyABSMJYndz15m4jipY) Kevin openly criticized mask mandates while vaccine rates have remained below 50% in his district and he went to Wyoming to hang out with Mike Pence — last time I checked, Wyoming isn’t a part of California’s 23rd Congressional District and Mike Pence isn’t a resident of the Central Valley. clean_body: | | | Folks, Kevin McCarthy has been helping raise money for Mike Pence. Hospitals across CA-23 are running out of beds. The COVID-19 pandemic is far from over and yet, the person who represents us in California’s 23rd Congressional District is nowhere to be found! So where has he been, folks? He was in Jackson Hole, Wyoming at a donor retreat with Mike Pence. Kevin openly criticized mask mandates while vaccine rates have remained below 50% in his district and he went to Wyoming to hang out with Mike Pence — last time I checked, Wyoming isn’t a part of California’s 23rd Congressional District and Mike Pence isn’t a resident of the Central Valley. clean_body: My good friend and pro-Trump Conservative, Mike Carey is up against a Leftist extremist who will bend the knee to Nancy Pelosi the minute she’s electe | Peter, We have less than 80 days until the OH-15 Special Election, and honestly I’m getting concerned. My good friend and pro-Trump Conservative, Mike Carey is up against a Leftist extremist who will bend the knee to Nancy Pelosi the minute she’s elected. If she wins this race, Pelosi will strengthen her grip in Congress and launch more witch hunts targeting my family and every Trump supporter in Congress. or if you’re going to sit on the sidelines in this race and let Nancy Pelosi take this seat. | Mike’s a fierce pro-Trump Conservative who won’t give Nancy Pelosi an inch in Congress. He knows more than anyone what’s at stake if Pelosi wins this seat going into 2022. That’s why my Dad didn’t hesitate giving Mike his full endorsement. Don’t let us down by staying out of this race and giving Nancy Pelosi a free pass to abuse her power. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. | | Paid for by Carey for Congress P.O. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Actions Speak Louder Than Words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f80a2988253947c7b5a68e0c0ada11e6&_e=ijwv1m8bjMTPA1tFVm1GStuM32iVgD3QBX-6nZBpJ3ap3eE_z7P6OPapKQxQsV83rXmqSw0HUnilrGQkJJ6F1um2v-WqBXfXp2Uo1s9wG8N_UJkf_Sv1TT9j86fPCtNVohee4TIyr-gVB1-PulaEzyWYhlFRul0gXLQXTVaECzhfE_c_08DENgqAKHApKxHvJvsqBD9HXd-a3TVq62Mjb2i9DOq6K1618fIrhQ2zPVPQ30YXWb65H2foWBFwY1-efv5sv1e3TBKr6qMxn9JhUPmx_DFVE1qpe_zXWKgPPk_b2lGTXjfpeMu9x318JRiP77CRQF2g-NcA6ax7BXm4tcKX5Uv4Dsr5xTIk4d-ctXtm6PucasuSPwy8WC_f0XRc6imzueq03fjStfB7Zp46i5HPsbYOVkwhbRmKdnQBtQ6WQG4wQZDjcbjt2Rp83UhYs8pNW_FPi-TxqM_tM75U1kKRW_FBpOed17uFwqLQRIMe4l--jF5oIlFsd5hW08e-WmfRicRJmAmaO1mCcLxu8g%3D%3D)
---
In politics, you come across plenty of people who talk a lot. It is much more rare to find someone who actually gets the job done. That's one of the things I'm most proud of from my time as Secretary of State: _our Administration didn 't just talk the talk. We walked the walk. Our actions matched our words._

**Promises made, promises kept.**

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f80a2988253947c7b5a68e0c0ada11e6&_e=ijwv1m8bjMTPA1tFVm1GStuM32iVgD3QBX-6nZBpJ3ap3eE_z7P6OPapKQxQsV83rXmqSw0HUnilrGQkJJ6F1um2v-WqBXfXp2Uo1s9wG8N_UJkf_Sv1TT9j86fPCtNVohee4TIyr-gVB1-PulaEzyWYhlFRul0gXLQXTVaECzhfE_c_08DENgqAKHApKxHvJvsqBD9HXd-a3TVq62Mjb2i9DOq6K1618fIrhQ2zPVPQ30YXWb65H2foWBFwY1-efv5sv1e3TBKr6qMxn9JhUPmx_DFVE1qpe_zXWKgPPk_b2lGTXjfpeMu9x318JRiPCg1jiV7jrFq7N0KHKjY05oLpS7pPi9jFyYhjGcH-fDZdPNR_Zx--VkLDYD5dA0LgQzFYYtQVQlSIk-r19H480ywGPHX1WZipCBqRoFkta6hfjLLEsRG7ciAbZLXQzNz8WDqealtGXlSvBNq_EoQnTUrlXqMViOZAnJCTq6Z71f2lEKu50WnlkyKVLgVIJXrtFlJDr_GzQAxtbrOz69r0rg%3D%3D)
---

We were honest, hard-working and treated the world as it is not as we wished it were. But, when the time came, when the situation so-required, we led. I sent messages repeatedly: "If you touch an American - you'll pay dearly."**Strength deters bad guys, weakness begets war.**

We defended Israel and changed the Middle East FOREVER. We left the disastrous Iran nuclear deal, sanctioned the Ayatollah in Iran and stopped sending them pallets of cash. We moved the U.S. embassy in Israel to Jerusalem, something Republican and Democrat Presidents had failed to do for years.

We took out the nasty Iranian general, Qasem Soleimani. He was on a mission to cause problems for America, but we were a few steps ahead of him. _The entire world is safer because of our decisive action._

We pushed for and secured major peace agreements - known as the Abraham Accords, which re-wrote decades of failed shuttle negotiations because we were willing to go against the elites of the foreign policy establishment to secure American freedom.

We said "au- revoir" to the flawed Paris Climate Accord. We all want clean air and safe drinking water, but the Paris agreement was a fantasy for elite diplomats who just want to virtue signal. When Biden re-entered this deal, our adversaries in China cheered.

America First means bringing Americans home. I'll never forget bringing home three American hostages from North Korea at 3:00 a.m. one morning. There's no greater honor than bringing so many Americans back home, including Pastor Brunson who was wrongly detained by Turkey for much too long.

Together with President Trump, we destroyed ISIS and its leadership. I'm confident that we saved innumerable lives and ended unendurable suffering.

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f80a2988253947c7b5a68e0c0ada11e6&_e=ijwv1m8bjMTPA1tFVm1GStuM32iVgD3QBX-6nZBpJ3ap3eE_z7P6OPapKQxQsV83rXmqSw0HUnilrGQkJJ6F1um2v-WqBXfXp2Uo1s9wG8N_UJkf_Sv1TT9j86fPCtNVohee4TIyr-gVB1-PulaEzyWYhlFRul0gXLQXTVaECzhfE_c_08DENgqAKHApKxHvJvsqBD9HXd-a3TVq62Mjb2i9DOq6K1618fIrhQ2zPVPQ30YXWb65H2foWBFwY1-efv5sv1e3TBKr6qMxn9JhUPmx_DFVE1qpe_zXWKgPPk_b2lGTXjfpeMu9x318JRiPVazhdgtSnfslE40nTM1G8R3aNe6k1WmjVbS1T2v5diolL4kvbE2fQNxxc9nf5PDPUqD3unFZdMmzm9-v7ZH7cbxsrffvPDGgzabvNgDAsp_MOJyDoW9B_cuSDQ5NjV3guAy6bUI0h9-0zK8QA1kONNWhLdl2bfk-EY06bPNEwpu1FIkU50mT17bkX5qifvbBOjucWGlzJnwgucpjWlRtmg%3D%3D)
---

Do you remember when the bad guys in Syria committed treacherous war crimes by gassing women and children? We drew a redline and then, unlike President Obama, when they crossed it, we fired 72 tomahawk missiles with near-perfect precision to take out their systems and to let them know it was a bad idea to do it again. They did not.

**America First takes courage. And it works.**

When the Chinese wanted to come steal your job - we said no way. 40 years of failure and letting "Made in China" crush us would stop. We demanded fair, reciprocal trade. Never forget: China depends far more on trading with us than we do with them.

I'm proud that we were the most pro-life administration in history. Denying the use of your money to perform abortions. Promoting adoption everywhere and always and appointing judges that understand the words life and liberty have real meaning.

And, we secured our borders. I was proud to be part of the team that negotiated one of our most effective policies in curbing illegal immigration: the remain in Mexico policy. It said simply that asylum seekers at our southern border must stay in Mexico until their hearing date, not come into our country illegally and stay unlawfully.

_I could go on and on with our accomplishments from the Trump Administration because we actually delivered on our promises._

We need more leaders at every level who won't just talk the talk, but who will actually walk the walk. _**That 's why I started a new organization - CAVPAC - to support principled conservatives in races all across the country who will actually deliver for the America First agenda.**_

If you want to see Republicans win back the House and the Senate by electing more America First conservatives, then I'm asking you to join me in this mission. **[By making a donation of just $100, $50 or $25, you will help us WIN BIG in the upcoming elections.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f80a2988253947c7b5a68e0c0ada11e6&_e=ijwv1m8bjMTPA1tFVm1GStuM32iVgD3QBX-6nZBpJ3ap3eE_z7P6OPapKQxQsV83rXmqSw0HUnilrGQkJJ6F1um2v-WqBXfXp2Uo1s9wG8N_UJkf_Sv1TT9j86fPCtNVohee4TIyr-gVB1-PulaEzyWYhlFRul0gXLQXTVaECzhfE_c_08DENgqAKHApKxHvJvsqBD9HXd-a3TVq62Mjb2i9DOq6K1618fIrhQ2zPVPQ30YXWb65H2foWBFwY1-efv5sv1e3TBKr6qMxn9JhUPmx_DFVE1qpe_zXWKgPPk_b2lGTXjfpeMu9x318JRiPX1nXFJ3hLU91LHf498P8jksb4Vz3qZ_YyP6CTs9qVF96lnnUkLjWfijP-isJMBnTeLVYoJ5kEkV1FkUWJzvXU9oIXnNYBKnpSiRUcOVY5ee0Yh0QhNXus8MwZE5nvm4v1o4cnhD3o3Ok8li8w0m0wGByeEXsYf6-vKNxZ11bKh7SWFEoDtodAZHF8qV4lJQ93oyYh7USHYL4P7ywzDcftg%3D%3D "By making a donation of just $100, $50 or $25, you will help us WIN BIG in the upcoming elections.")**

---

You know me, you know my record, and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. **With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.**

Never Give An Inch,

That's one of the things I'm most proud of from my time as Secretary of State: our Administration didn 't just talk the talk. We walked the walk. Our actions matched our words. Promises made, promises kept. | We were honest, hard-working and treated the world as it is not as we wished it were. But, when the time came, when the situation so-required, we led. I sent messages repeatedly: "If you touch an American - you'll pay dearly."Strength deters bad guys, weakness begets war. We defended Israel and changed the Middle East FOREVER. We left the disastrous Iran nuclear deal, sanctioned the Ayatollah in Iran and stopped sending them pallets of cash. We moved the U.S. embassy in Israel to Jerusalem, something Republican and Democrat Presidents had failed to do for years. We took out the nasty Iranian general, Qasem Soleimani. He was on a mission to cause problems for America, but we were a few steps ahead of him. The entire world is safer because of our decisive action. We pushed for and secured major peace agreements - known as the Abraham Accords, which re-wrote decades of failed shuttle negotiations because we were willing to go against the elites of the foreign policy establishment to secure American freedom. We said "au- revoir" to the flawed Paris Climate Accord. We all want clean air and safe drinking water, but the Paris agreement was a fantasy for elite diplomats who just want to virtue signal. When Biden re-entered this deal, our adversaries in China cheered. America First means bringing Americans home. I'll never forget bringing home three American hostages from North Korea at 3:00 a.m. one morning. There's no greater honor than bringing so many Americans back home, including Pastor Brunson who was wrongly detained by Turkey for much too long. Together with President Trump, we destroyed ISIS and its leadership. I'm confident that we saved innumerable lives and ended unendurable suffering. | Do you remember when the bad guys in Syria committed treacherous war crimes by gassing women and children? We drew a redline and then, unlike President Obama, when they crossed it, we fired 72 tomahawk missiles with near-perfect precision to take out their systems and to let them know it was a bad idea to do it again. They did not. America First takes courage. And it works. When the Chinese wanted to come steal your job - we said no way. 40 years of failure and letting "Made in China" crush us would stop. We demanded fair, reciprocal trade. Never forget: China depends far more on trading with us than we do with them. I'm proud that we were the most pro-life administration in history. Denying the use of your money to perform abortions. Promoting adoption everywhere and always and appointing judges that understand the words life and liberty have real meaning. And, we secured our borders. I was proud to be part of the team that negotiated one of our most effective policies in curbing illegal immigration: the remain in Mexico policy. It said simply that asylum seekers at our southern border must stay in Mexico until their hearing date, not come into our country illegally and stay unlawfully. I could go on and on with our accomplishments from the Trump Administration because we actually delivered on our promises. We need more leaders at every level who won't just talk the talk, but who will actually walk the walk. That 's why I started a new organization - CAVPAC - to support principled conservatives in races all across the country who will actually deliver for the America First agenda. If you want to see Republicans win back the House and the Senate by electing more America First conservatives, then I'm asking you to join me in this mission. "By making a donation of just $100, $50 or $25, you will help us WIN BIG in the upcoming elections." | | You know me, you know my record, and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people. Never Give An Inch, | Mike Pompeo | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e334c2079b5f48098aa4b9eed02c97e4&_e=R4nwh6EQO1NPD4LkXJRWfuZz1uFoJZdyJBPwUeA1UmIBg4NeloJ_h6spLxtYH1_dBokVh3NRC_BVYjnEiVGa23m9KgBp-H7_tyr7DyBFOkg_I-Fi5hg8AfaeLg2H2XcE1-vCFUCbGobqMnnfWLxDu1l4pp_N-CX5MNlpptxvS46dbbb9tS0cfcXoHvCRzCg131SJksMR7bo3pYzOf5Twx7xdN67fNVQksVjtdl9hx6B-e1ioX_y3eYMaxfBGHAuQJjGP5T8jeqtkKVts8hYJcasVlxwUBrUBEsDhH45Rb58YgRlXfKPia7yvuBcHfdjTDtEf5HMQvaVhV-BB6VKH3YZ1CRCk78lXi4-pTEQ37oVtPHm9wNZPBGFNEi4b5SAJ)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Did you see Pramila’s email re: Afghanistan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our focus must be on the people who are on the receiving end of this decision to go to war and stay in Afghanistan for 20 years.
#
Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw Pramila's email from yesterday.

Afghanistan was America’s longest war. Two decades after we arrived, we have a moral responsibility to the Afghans affected by our presence.

**We must safely evacuate our allies and immediately process visas for refugees — _no more red tape and no more delays._[If you agree, sign on in support of our push to ensure speedy and safe travel for Afghan refugees who want to settle in the United States.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210819-556&t=1&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)** **[Sign On](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210819-556&t=2&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)**
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Wed, Aug 18, 2021
Subject: Sign on to support Afghan refugees
Peter,
I fully support President Biden’s decision to withdraw troops from Afghanistan. It was clear for quite some time that even after 2,300 American lives lost, $1 trillion, 20 years of war, and many more Afghan civilian casualties, the United States could not have averted this outcome without an endless military presence.
I am encouraged by the efforts of the Biden administration to ensure the safety and security of those currently in Afghanistan, but **our government needs to go farther — and work faster.** The United States must do everything we can to ensure refugees can travel to America without bureaucratic delay, recognizing the difficulty people have in leaving Afghanistan right now.
[**If you agree, please sign on in support of our push to ensure speedy and safe travel for Afghan refugees who want to settle in the United States. This is our obligation after 20 years of war.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210819-556&t=3&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)
**[Sign On](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210819-556&t=4&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)**
In the coming weeks and months, we all must participate in the needed examination of why 20 years of war have failed. But our focus right now must be on the human beings who are on the receiving end of this decision to go to war and stay in Afghanistan for two decades.
We must also increase humanitarian aid to support civilians who fled to Kabul and provincial capitals and are without shelter, food, medical assistance, or vaccines. The heartbreaking situation confronting ordinary Afghans after 20 years of American war requires us to act as quickly as we can.
[**So, please join me by adding your name to my call to immediately welcome Afghan refugees to America. This needs to happen right now in order to save lives.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210819-556&t=5&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)
**[Sign On](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210819-556&t=6&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210819-556-footer&t=7&refcode2=556_420207_8ZvY7v&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=8&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=556%2E420207%2E8ZvY7v)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

He passed legislation to ensure the Chinese Communist Party can no longer steal our tax payer funded research. You see, Randy Feenstra has one focus – Delivering results for Iowa! Randy is effective, and this is why Nancy Pelosi will do whatever she can do defeat Randy next November. Last year alone, Pelosi’s hand-picked candidate spent nearly 3 MILLION DOLLARS to defeat Randy – and they failed. We need to send a strong message to Nancy Pelosi. In Iowa, conservative results matter, and no amount of money can buy this seat for her coastal liberal candidates.

| Peter,
---
| **Joe Biden gave Afghanistan to the Taliban** ... _abandoning_ tens of thousands of our citizens and allies to brutal terrorists. Then, **he went on vacation.** Joe Biden is unfit to serve as Commander-in-Chief, and I'm calling on you--as a patriot--to **[sign the petition demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58160378:JcYltOlSN:m:1:3253819041:08AA4F50663A435A46A9C091062E5B56:r "sign the petition
demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment.")**

It's about **how Joe Biden so badly bungled this mission** and**failed to protect our allies, our people, and our military secrets.** Or as Barack Obama once put it, **" Don't underestimate Joe's ability to f*** things up."** Joe Biden has disgraced our nation, betrayed our allies, and destroyed all international trust in America... and then, he refused to take responsibility. **[American patriots must hold him accountable. Candace

[**Can you chip in just $1 (that's not a mistake or a typo) to our progressive movement right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34339874/301669114/446234574?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=MTFC_20210819_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzk4Y2IzOS00ODAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCosHQ30LFn8oVCzEIAR93nIinyQCNMHDwcFssvL-aU=)

body:
You've shown that you're someone that John can rely on to *NOT* tune out of this race (even when some others might).
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210819-2325-header&t=1&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)
Peter,
I'm reaching out to ask if you'll step up in a big way by [** _making your first-ever $5 donation to John Fetterman's campaign for Senate today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27855?refcode=em20210819-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)
I was just reviewing our campaign budget for the remainder of the summer, and I noticed a concerning trend in our numbers that I wanted to show you right away:
**We've seen a little bit of a slowdown in our fundraising.** Here's a behind-the-scenes look at our numbers from ActBlue:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27855?refcode=em20210819-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)
It can be notoriously difficult for campaigns to raise money over the summer. Why? Because a lot of folks go on vacation or are generally less plugged in with political news.
_But the truth is that seeing a dip in our fundraising like this — even during the summer — can set our campaign back if things don't improve right away._
**That's why I'm reaching out to you, Peter. As one of John's early supporters, you've shown that you're someone that John can rely on to *NOT* tune out of this race. Even when some others might.** And right now, we're leaning on folks like you to make your first contribution to fill the hole in our summer budget before our first office opens in Pittsburgh.
[**_Would you be willing to contribute $5 to John Fetterman's campaign for U.S. Senate today? If enough people who open this email today decide to chip in, we'll be able to close the gap on our summer fundraising right away._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27855?refcode=em20210819-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27855?refcode=em20210819-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)**
We're SO deeply grateful to have support from every single one of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. Thank you for being such an important part of Team Fetterman. 💙
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210819-2325-footer&t=24&refcode2=2325_434096_4FB94G&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2325%2E434096%2E4FB94G)

name: Donna Imam
subject: The For the People Act
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34340329/301672003/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWYxYTJlZS00OTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4w9Rwm36jZlRb4_59eNKqOFgocKIRXn9lblfYCOb5HA=)
Friend --

**[This is an important email that illustrates that in Texas, we have NO OTHER OPTION than to inform and mobilize voters against the GOP suppression bills. Please read it, then consider chipping in $3 so I can fight this locally on the ground.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34340330/301672004/77586780?refcode=em-08192021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWYxYTJlZS00OTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4w9Rwm36jZlRb4_59eNKqOFgocKIRXn9lblfYCOb5HA=)**

For Texans the importance of passing legislation to defend our democracy and protect voting rights is a matter of grave urgency.

The House has passed a number of good bills this year. Some have been signed into law, but many have ended up in the legislative graveyard that is the US Senate. Democrats hold a narrow majority, but it takes 60 votes to get cloture before passing a bill, and sending it to the President's desk for a signature.

**One example is H.R. 1 -- the _For the People Act._** This bill, which passed in the House, would establish same-day voter registration, expand mail-in voting, make election day a national holiday, end partisan gerrymandering, and reform the election finance process for more transparency.

This legislation would be a game-changer for Texas. As you know, our state GOP has been willing to do whatever it takes to tip the scales to stop people from voting.

**Stopping voter suppression legislation in Texas will be tough without a federal voting rights bill like H.R. 1, but the truth is the future of this bill in the Senate is looking bleak.**

The assault on voting rights won't go away overnight, but we can't afford to fall short in 2022. That's a major reason why I am running for this congressional seat, and it's why I'm reaching out today, friend.

**What our campaign can do is go door-to-door and make Texans aware of what's really at stake here. We've shown that we know how to do this by leading in voter turnout across Texas in 2020. With your help we can do it again -- that's how we flip Texas.**

**[We're coming up $13,191 short of our weekly goal. Can you chip in $3 today? Your contribution will go straight to work organizing voters around voting rights and winning this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34340331/301672005/77586780?refcode=em-08192021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWYxYTJlZS00OTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4w9Rwm36jZlRb4_59eNKqOFgocKIRXn9lblfYCOb5HA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34340332/301672006/77586780?refcode=em-08192021-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWYxYTJlZS00OTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4w9Rwm36jZlRb4_59eNKqOFgocKIRXn9lblfYCOb5HA=)

clean_body: | = Friend -- = For Texans the importance of passing legislation to defend our democracy and protect voting rights is a matter of grave urgency. The House has passed a number of good bills this year. Some have been signed into law, but many have ended up in the legislative graveyard that is the US Senate. Democrats hold a narrow majority, but it takes 60 votes to get cloture before passing a bill, and sending it to the President's desk for a signature. One example is H.R. 1 -- the For the People Act. This bill, which passed in the House, would establish same-day voter registration, expand mail-in voting, make election day a national holiday, end partisan gerrymandering, and reform the election finance process for more transparency. This legislation would be a game-changer for Texas. As you know, our state GOP has been willing to do whatever it takes to tip the scales to stop people from voting. Stopping voter suppression legislation in Texas will be tough without a federal voting rights bill like H.R. 1, but the truth is the future of this bill in the Senate is looking bleak. The assault on voting rights won't go away overnight, but we can't afford to fall short in 2022. That's a major reason why I am running for this congressional seat, and it's why I'm reaching out today, friend. What our campaign can do is go door-to-door and make Texans aware of what's really at stake here. We've shown that we know how to do this by leading in voter turnout across Texas in 2020. With your help we can do it again -- that's how we flip Texas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. We have only selected a limited number of activists from your state, so your response is critical to ensuring our data is accurate >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15a50849-db06-4c9a-8b17-c4eedc86d3f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **

* * *
The Postal Service has been under attack for years, but now we have a real chance to make a difference.

[Remember, a functioning Postal Service is critical to vote-by-mail and voting rights all over the country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4972b039-25f0-4e78-b58b-2178d417e36e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Fellow American,

_There's a tidal wave building right now_ - a huge "red wave" of Republican wins coming in 2022.

This is a historic opportunity for widespread victories like the ones the GOP scored in 1994 _and gave our party control of both the Senate and the House of Representatives for the first time in over 40 years._

Fellow American, when you look at President Joe Biden's first six months in office and Democrats running the House and the Senate, things have been _amazingly bad._

The Democrats have already spent trillions of your tax dollars on massive giveaways to their supporters, driving up inflation and prices for America's working families. Incredibly, they plan to spend trillions more.

In the wake of last summer's rampant leftist political violence and demonization of police, crime is exploding in our big cities, while the Democrats hold committee hearings to look for conservative conspiracies where none exist.

Our wide-open Mexican border is seeing the highest level of illegal immigration in ten years with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than 180,000 migrants crossing the border in May alone. From Afghanistan to the South China Sea, the threat of wider conflict seems greater every day.

Fellow American, the American people understand that Democrat rule in Washington has come at a high price to our prosperity, freedom, and security, and they're ready for a new direction. The GOP has a huge opportunity - _**[but ONLY IF we have the resources we need to help them win.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4b8152f161104c5fb3ed5f6ae92acffc&_e=i0Poq_kYa83RWmocuvwzIAz5HOebnmvUg2eca57ebPO8hRY5SgDFpIAmzCzkRZtc1zP016fE9G5vBlYWu2ZAGJeOUMUewykPYVrxu6cSSoBmCdHrpwmJf6sN2ErewhCbuoC7_2GF2k6TQRsQfWS4wqqdKnDLv9R7nlzaV6AwLR2C0-xRQTEuCLbfiPSrIvc03ykX6juqFO7ah_bpU3NkEfJshFXPBBwhhllGYJIgjl9U_ajHLmz9ssWHNsSymxeHpJW8fnqg3J2CEQcxHh5fe-5YRMjbayy2ROsw3ozcCc3TG1ioEdHRnX6zYV0D_7eLlXdJ5zd_-FRsUUtLmPZRSyct2neXPPDczH0V7vwRaL5-MeTZZGkJirKethHcUl1ncEbKeFG2uxn2zkdY0rw7ekLGX2hHa_gcPoMOM-EVpOKOSy6FwssDSBWJKVs2SGdl6Ht-MKIBD9q04rXm4PHT3JpNt3lNk7fLiuyH78UxNdpprn4RGvPJexWTn1sagg9O)**_

**Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop the Democrats and their disastrous agenda with historic victories in next year's 2022 Midterm Elections.**

Even though we only need to gain one seat in the U.S. Senate to retake control, I believe we can win more. We're also in an incredible position to far outpace the mere five seats needed in the House of Representatives to bounce Nancy Pelosi from the Speaker's seat.

I see the real possibility of sweeping victories - _like in 1994_ - that will allow new Republican majorities to bring the radical Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda on Capitol Hill to a screeching halt.

clean_body: This is a historic opportunity for widespread victories like the ones the GOP scored in 1994 and gave our party control. This is a historic opportunity for widespread victories like the ones the GOP scored in 1994 and gave our party control. | Fellow American, There's a tidal wave building right now - a huge "red wave" of Republican wins coming in 2022. This is a historic opportunity for widespread victories like the ones the GOP scored in 1994 and gave our party control of both the Senate and the House of Representatives for the first time in over 40 years. Fellow American, when you look at President Joe Biden's first six months in office and Democrats running the House and the Senate, things have been amazingly bad. The Democrats have already spent trillions of your tax dollars on massive giveaways to their supporters, driving up inflation and prices for America's working families. Incredibly, they plan to spend trillions more. In the wake of last summer's rampant leftist political violence and demonization of police, crime is exploding in our big cities, while the Democrats hold committee hearings to look for conservative conspiracies where none exist. Our wide-open Mexican border is seeing the highest level of illegal immigration in ten years with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than 180,000 migrants crossing the border in May alone. From Afghanistan to the South China Sea, the threat of wider conflict seems greater every day. Fellow American, the American people understand that Democrat rule in Washington has come at a high price to our prosperity, freedom, and security, and they're ready for a new direction. The GOP has a huge opportunity - | Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop the Democrats and their disastrous agenda with historic victories in next year's 2022 Midterm Elections. Even though we only need to gain one seat in the U.S. Senate to retake control, I believe we can win more. We're also in an incredible position to far outpace the mere five seats needed in the House of Representatives to bounce Nancy Pelosi from the Speaker's seat. I see the real possibility of sweeping victories - like in 1994 - that will allow new Republican majorities to bring the radical Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda on Capitol Hill to a screeching halt. In 1994, the overreach of Democrats and the American voters' rejection of their failing agenda gave the Republican Party one of its greatest series of election victories ever, and a very similar situation is building today. Thanks, Lindsey Graham | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

| Friend,
Patriots like Amanda Makki have long known that the Biden agenda is wrong for America... But now, even Democrats are sure to be getting buyer’s remorse. **That’s because we’re seeing the real-time results of failed Democrat policies, and they have already been costing our country dearly! **

Just this past weekend, we saw the botched attempt to protect American citizens while Afghanistan fell to the Taliban. This is exactly the kind of failed leadership we need to replace. We need strong conservatives with proven records to stop this - and Amanda Makki is ready to put her leadership to work. [**Will you support her campaign today so that the MULTIPLE crises in Joe Biden’s America don’t become even worse?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=bac660a88e&e=c2296cffff)

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, Patriots like Amanda Makki have long known that the Biden agenda is wrong for America... But now, even Democrats are sure to be getting buyer’s remorse. That’s because we’re seeing the real-time results of failed Democrat policies, and they have already been costing our country dearly! Just this past weekend, we saw the botched attempt to protect American citizens while Afghanistan fell to the Taliban. This is exactly the kind of failed leadership we need to replace. We need strong conservatives with proven records to stop this - and Amanda Makki is ready to put her leadership to work. | "STOP THE BIDEN AGENDA: SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI!" | | Thanks to the Biden-Harris administration, we’ve seen higher inflation that everyday Americans are paying for. We’ve seen the worst illegal immigration crisis in history, all because these politicians chose to STOP wall construction and instead follow Open Borders policies. We’ve also seen crime spikes in just about every major city in America, and no accountability has come to Communist regimes with rampant human rights abuses like China and Cuba! This is nothing like the leadership we saw under President Trump - Pitch in to help Amanda Makki in her mission to flip the House, provide a check on the Left’s one-party rule, and get America back on track! | "PITCH IN $20.22" | "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT" | Thank you for the support, Makki for Congress | Amanda Makki for Congress| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

body:
| | | | Today, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration...

Dear Peter,
Today, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration to withdraw its “Remain in Mexico” policy, which has helped facilitate so much fentanyl smuggling into West Virginia and America.
We have seen the incompetence and reckless foreign policy actions coming out of the Biden Administration every week.
The Afghanistan debacle is just the latest in a long string of disastrous actions _which are putting China, Russia, and our geopolitical adversaries FIRST, and America LAST._
Biden approved Russia’s NORD pipeline, while stopping construction of America’s Keystone Pipeline. _Now, Biden has the gall to ask OPEC for help— AFTER crippling America’s energy independence through his reckless policies._
_And the Border. Reckless!_
Biden’s open border policies are breaking records in all the wrong ways. While undocumented aliens are streaming across the borders at obscene levels, deadly fentanyl is being smuggled into the U.S. at rates never seen before.
That’s why West Virginia and my Office is stepping up and suing the Biden Administration yet again.
I won’t stand for Biden’s open border policies and his inept foreign policies. A Commander-in Chief is supposed to secure our borders and help protect us.
That’s just not happening under President Biden.
Fortunately, West Virginia is fighting back. We will stop this. We must stop this. We need to reverse these disastrous policies which are putting America Last.
Help me fight the far-left, woke, machine. And root our big new lawsuit on to victory!

clean_body: | | | | Today, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration... Dear Peter, Today, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration to withdraw its “Remain in Mexico” policy, which has helped facilitate so much fentanyl smuggling into West Virginia and America. We have seen the incompetence and reckless foreign policy actions coming out of the Biden Administration every week. The Afghanistan debacle is just the latest in a long string of disastrous actions which are putting China, Russia, and our geopolitical adversaries FIRST, and America LAST. Biden approved Russia’s NORD pipeline, while stopping construction of America’s Keystone Pipeline. Now, Biden has the gall to ask OPEC for help— AFTER crippling America’s energy independence through his reckless policies. And the Border. Reckless! Biden’s open border policies are breaking records in all the wrong ways. While undocumented aliens are streaming across the borders at obscene levels, deadly fentanyl is being smuggled into the U.S. at rates never seen before. That’s why West Virginia and my Office is stepping up and suing the Biden Administration yet again. I won’t stand for Biden’s open border policies and his inept foreign policies. A Commander-in Chief is supposed to secure our borders and help protect us. That’s just not happening under President Biden. Fortunately, West Virginia is fighting back. We will stop this. We must stop this. We need to reverse these disastrous policies which are putting America Last. Help me fight the far-left, woke, machine. And root our big new lawsuit on to victory! Thanks. | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. The Radical Left is sending our great nation down the dark path to Socialism more and more every day.

If I know anything about my loyal supporters and Hoosiers, it’s that we work **HARD** for what we have. That’s what makes us proud, free American citizens.

Democrats don’t care about working hard or the American dream. They care about power and **CONTROL.**

I refuse to sit back and watch the Radical Left spend millions -- giving out free money and stimulus while hardworking Americans bear the brunt of these policies.

If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=33925d02a41d4aec89009ea410f2047a&_e=WTOJ9ohDaByQLIIxN7MqmAZFC4ht8XiOFPpYiThlIEn9sICQ2Ugk5EdEwuwInecNKMkMWnnZtFjuoZ-i37O8gSDZ91N0E_CddzrvmRlYwlGZPMOa7h0OvFfTcnJhMdWz54xjfZi0j8b5E-QpviTYWmjMBVHVBd4iMGJNUVmhiFCN5KIrfGi1Vparl4VVJbDMPYg2GkOqQtS-TrCqkMdSULrX-AGlYD0vuq2Jcy_1JiA-0n6Pcj8Q_vs-nfTN8RHxItI03Xm5xbEWL-4LeoE1pq1UUznhxZqLUi4ghX4Zkg9GFWPgK8CFLKdPQ9xLiKV-ew6Sps-UqohjewlzT0tpUzijxhImOyD9VpX_o6XKNXH_DmnfYHD6YTMON19wXK_qXD9UU-0vT-wc8P96Ox3F8Q%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

In this Biden-initiated border crisis, illegals are flooding over our southern border in historic numbers, with lawlessness, crime, and now a public health crisis gripping the entire state of Texas.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=33925d02a41d4aec89009ea410f2047a&_e=WTOJ9ohDaByQLIIxN7MqmAZFC4ht8XiOFPpYiThlIEn9sICQ2Ugk5EdEwuwInecNKMkMWnnZtFjuoZ-i37O8gSDZ91N0E_CddzrvmRlYwlGZPMOa7h0OvFfTcnJhMdWz54xjfZi0j8b5E-QpviTYWmjMBVHVBd4iMGJNUVmhiFCSNHI5sHTl-6l436fkDpOhjcbnlMVTBOIuq0U-UbzCOjgbnAtwdtGcrcbVqx1tCLMoLgatN58Hr6F6hGJvbEkFQplUZSooZ70G6DQb5xtNiXT7oRDKFQV-V52ML7-h2hwgh1tzhRc5ZawKs4CffM6xQFSONr17-13o9AU8sp-ghZCdbavYsCeLcwwN1df-5GIDQln3XT3zk314xB7En8EDJmE7zv7CCNt87PjfMRH2WA%3D%3D)
The Rio Grande Valley is being hit especially hard, with most new COVID cases coming from illegals or Texans who have encountered these invaders. As the Biden administration, with Gov. Abbott's tacit approval, ships these illegals across the state, other urban health centers such as Houston, Austin, Dallas, and others are also suffering.

Fellow American, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border.

Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures!

We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Fellow American - it's just common sense.

_In fact_ , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state.

Fellow American, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty.

[** PUT TEXANS FIRST ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=33925d02a41d4aec89009ea410f2047a&_e=WTOJ9ohDaByQLIIxN7MqmAZFC4ht8XiOFPpYiThlIEn9sICQ2Ugk5EdEwuwInecNKMkMWnnZtFjuoZ-i37O8gSDZ91N0E_CddzrvmRlYwlGZPMOa7h0OvFfTcnJhMdWz54xjfZi0j8b5E-QpviTYWmjMBVHVBd4iMGJNUVmhiFAqJmFl6Y-XzrfAxvqIetgHreRB_uuXOVzTfRVWfNPYYjcNdmR-vjBo9a894FdwEX8DrmyYyaqqCyEKtC5ithkN8bxggBmmhyDIRjkd-pWKe6gH4uE9BQwBbON0iCNsEh05yHG5-EgVBReUARz6Qn1HyEJXNeBvjWSnv77qLEaZrFQXMidYNn94LPpA9yFpd3uqoSUg9095sYQbKAuvRzloGPRAn38oFOzD6dzQyUb8CA%3D%3D)
Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures.

If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first.

[**Will you join me in this fight, Fellow American?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=33925d02a41d4aec89009ea410f2047a&_e=WTOJ9ohDaByQLIIxN7MqmAZFC4ht8XiOFPpYiThlIEn9sICQ2Ugk5EdEwuwInecNKMkMWnnZtFjuoZ-i37O8gSDZ91N0E_CddzrvmRlYwlGZPMOa7h0OvFfTcnJhMdWz54xjfZi0j8b5E-QpviTYWmjMBVHVBd4iMGJNUVmhiFD8DQSOJePlrFcZIL_XC4e2mVT0ITYF8mbDmR4as1SfoxAHXkYjrcOfvGOsHmVBlj10YivSx1iayeudgitakBkjEgFYFHyFvSb629CT7JOAeohzMtctFm721aqh9B6Xi7rGs4NazY6eCQbrB6s4vf3StW3H2zJjPsDXbkaJPkWXFE6Brzv3j63yqfcFsclm6BrpH9DB9O_o0tXN-DMXv0x2n-H0n6SMVVJjVY5ZelqvnQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. | Fellow American, In this Biden-initiated border crisis, illegals are flooding over our southern border in historic numbers, with lawlessness, crime, and now a public health crisis gripping the entire state of Texas. The Rio Grande Valley is being hit especially hard, with most new COVID cases coming from illegals or Texans who have encountered these invaders. As the Biden administration, with Gov. Abbott's tacit approval, ships these illegals across the state, other urban health centers such as Houston, Austin, Dallas, and others are also suffering. Fellow American, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border. Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures! We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Fellow American - it's just common sense. In fact , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state. Fellow American, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty. Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures. If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first. For Freedom, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Peter,

Since the start of the pandemic, crime has skyrocketed here in Georgia.

**And it’s not just bad in Atlanta - crime is on the rise across the state. It’s happening in our own backyards!**

I wanted to check in with you today to see how you’re feeling about the crime surge, Peter.
[**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=17a9966c01034f5a8ab89199a3713f82&_e=Ui8JgdQvepJr9TSJtKINfQHA1ZYGlwMtI0XtgCcYIs6AxLFKRCBlQD92AyN03pm8AVRPkitj2qqsebUdgC9Phg_jdEafBCpSw-9mAsxxwEoN8F519kj3-1i9qNvO7NpOmhZ3flcLxayNbqcPBPBBVPTel7pJhv0NHzVv6ffr5eWgBZVrOYg1qAjY6T3uIF8toDxaZ7clt36kP1E-EEwBICvTk3XKBKAl1dhoPh0OKjvI6UntxaQ7lKUFj3_aReV074fSfyzTmDB7g174u0R230HnEpueWzOKx6t9IFnUT-VqmFVIY9SZPhNJdyTlnPMkgmSqW--VN6xGU3EMz8PXMVPjNm1HitEcewG337MuCTiCy1k0W3M0p_BsJFiE2aZk12HE0JL1MTHp4_dEv33W0OXax1OjqXKwGoKJS_MV-vl2Ze3QX1WwnwA3zU95fyzbh3N2whwBNTXmLwIcEtb1cNDa7gnYMWBZoD73xiN783Ac-ebmQ6dhbYvodG_JMDg4)

clean_body: Are you able to make it? | Are you coming? I’m not sure if you saw my last email or not, but I was hoping that you would be able to join us on September 18th for my Inaugural Tailgate Celebration! I’ll be joined by Senator Tom Cotton, and we are looking forward to sharing more about what amazing things are coming for Iowa, and the nation. | I hope you will be here to celebrate all that we have accomplished together. Here in Iowa, we take pride in working hard, raising our families, and winning. Whether it’s by six points or six votes. If you are unable to attend, but would like to show your support: I can’t wait to see you soon, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?
